All these years had a very good experience with Myntra. Recently, I placed an order with Myntra with 8items. The Myntra app is not opening at all. Every time I try to open it, it either keeps loading or crashes immediately. Myntra is running an online fraud. I have escalated the issue multiple times and every time they asked me to wait 2-3 business days for an update. Myntra is one of the best shopping apps for fashion lovers. The app has a clean and user-friendly interface, making it easy to browse through a wide range of clothing, footwear, and accessories. They try to automate too many systems. Their help chat is unhelpful and will flag a safety issue when you just want a reciept. When you place an order, after the confirmation page - you can't view what the payment method was. You get no reciept until the delivery is completed. So.... why am i not allowed to see the confirmation page again? Sus af to not have it available the entire time. Also, it takes forever to get on the phone with anyone on support.

I canceled an order 5-10 minutes after placing it. Uber Eats took the whole payment regardless and refused, several times, a refund. I asked customer service three times to refund because it was only 5-10 minutes after placing the order, and they ended the "chat" each time. I remember the days when customer service was over the phone, or you could properly dispute a case. It is absurd, no matter the store, to pay almost full price if you cancel an order within a decent time range. Absurd.

Customer service basically doesn't exist. All I've had is partial refunds for missing items. No actual standards for how to remedy a mistake, just partial refunds and ghosting you. And once they only refunded me 1 euro for a dish that cost 5 euro (due to the way it was bundled to a menu), and they didn't care at all no matter how much I wrote in the help ticket. Total trash. Also reviews for restaurants in the app is completely unreliable, it does not represent the reality you can see on GMaps.

Double the price than actually in the restaurant. The app will charge you to change condiments when the vendor does not. Sometimes, my food order is $15.00, and Uber comes in, adding $10.00 or more in service fees. It's chicken on sticks. How is it a $10 charge with a delivery fee? And dont forget that tips are extra. If you ask for a refund. They just give you credits, not your money back in the original form of payment. Use a credit card so you can dispute them instead of getting Uber credits.

Before you order, go to the restaurant's website and look at their prices. UE tacks on extra price to every item, before charging ridiculous fees, before charging an "optional" tip and asking if you want to pay even more to avoid having your driver make multiple stops on the way. All for your $15 turned $30+ order to arrive an hour later cold. Just order takeout and go get the food. It will be faster and save you both money and energy.

Absolutely atrocious customer service. I've tried many times to accept this app but it's horrible. Not once have I had an order be correct, and only once have I been refunded for my issues. I've had food come with mistakes, food missing all together, etc. No way to talk to a real person to get this dealt with properly. Tried ordering again today, missing four sandwiches, the app OVERCHARGING me for items NOT on my list, time to dispute with my bank. I beg of you, don't use this app!

I don't recommend any of these delivery apps. I recently switched from Door Dash to Uber Eats. I made an order, and when the driver arrived, they mentioned that the items I ordered were missing and that the order needed to be canceled. Canceling the order on my phone ended up charging me $28. I contacted support, and they basically said theres nothing they can do because I canceled the order.

I have experienced repeated issues with missing items in my recent orders. Yesterday, my order was missing a drink. When I reported it, I was informed that it was not eligible for a refund. I contacted customer service but did not receive a response. The automated chat system provided identical, unhelpful replies. Today, the same issue occurred. I am paying a 30% service fee for a bad service... Not worth it!

Biggest rip-off with the add-on fees. Also, if you get the wrong order (as happened to me, I received food I am allergic to and NOT what I ordered) they just give you $5 credit when the cost of getting the incorrect food in the first place is much more than $5 and to reorder new food cost more than $5. They clearly do not value their customers and I will be uninstalling this app.

Bad customer service. Did not help me with my issue. Ordered food at the wrong location in a different state and canceled. wanted a refund so we can buy again at the right location but didn't get a refund. We canceled the order not even a minute after ordering after noticing the wrong location. Two days later, I tried ordering, and it would not allow me to order. I called them, and they said they would email to help me fix the problem, but they never emailed me back. My voucher expired too.

Edit: Tried to use their grocery delivery today and when an item was missing they told me nothing they can do, no reason. Don't cancel an order on "your own," ask them for help, or they will give the resturant your money and not deliver it without any warning. Even after a second the reaturant is already "hard at work" and the driver is "on the way." so your money and tip are gone. I'm sure many people love just giving their money away for free, canceling your order is a "great" (scam) feature.

Just keeps getting worse. I haven't used ubereats in a while because it's incredibly expensive. I use to use it when they'd offer promotions to offset that cost. They basically stopped sending me promotions last September. I just got one for the first time since then, and it won't apply to my account no matter what I do. I contacted support and they said "place the order and we will reimburse you if it doesn't work". I'm not wasting my time with support to get a promo you offered me.

H&M clothes are of good quality. But if you order something and then return it, it takes a minimum of 14 days for the refund to be processed, and there's no option for exchange either.And if you call customer service and ask when your refund will proceed they say the refund will proceed in 14 to 30 days. so this is worst app for shopping.

Thankfully, I have 1yr Disney+ with Uber One, otherwise would have been a complete waste of money, as will not be ordering from Uber Eats again. TBF there was a trial period, but I thought it would mess up Disney offer, so didn't use. I was impressed with my grocery order, seeing items being picked in real time, shortly after I ordered. Even more impressed, my delivery expected in 15min .. eventually turned up after 45min, ice cream defrosted. Then found individual prices are higher than store.

Why would you remove the option to sort restaurants by distance/delivery times? Now all I get are restaurants that are 1 hour delivery times and can't tell what's near me and open. The app is almost unusable unless I know exactly what restaurant I want to order from. edit: well you did it again for some reason. no option to filter by delivery time or distance, no filter for restaurants I've favorited, just a bunch of promotions for garbage fast food. Why do you hate your users?

Horrible customer service and poor app UI. Restaurant and grocery orders very often are missing items, or food is damaged like eggs being completely cracked. Uber has never once offered any sort of refund or voucher. How can you charge me when entire items are missing from the order? It's also now very hard to get a human representative, and all they tell me to do is leave a review on the order. DoorDash is better in every way. They give refunds right away after sending photo proof.

It has gotten worse over the years regarding it's customer service and issues with finding drivers and stick to the dedicated time, more often I have seen big delays and drivers who opts in to collect food then signs out only to be picked up by someone else. Food delivery in itself has gotten bad, several times they have missed delivery and says delivered, wrong address only for us to restart again. Also, if items are missed from the list, they do not take the effort to resolve it properly.

The estimated time to receive food is always off by at least 15 minutes. My arrival times are constantly pushed back. There have been too many errors with my orders and Uber hasn't refunded me, just gave me a small credit that doesn't even pay for the ridiculous and unnecessary fees they charge. Will be deleting this and downloading door dash.

The app itself is very clear and easy to navigate and there's usually something new and fresh to see. Promos and coupons are always good!! However, I understand the risks and such in doing so but it would help so much if there was an option to pay cash on delivery. It gives you the option of COD but then won't allow me to do this. This is very frustrating and creates loss of business. I'm having this issue with most of the delivery apps....

Uber eats has gone so far downhill! Everything is highly marked up in price, the app experience is terrible, but I finally said quits when the order was sent to the wrong location, hey mistakes happen, no big deal, yet I was still charged for it because the order was within my vecinity, no idea what neighbor ended up getting my food, but it sure wasn't me, im done with Uber eats, use literally any other app, most restaurants deliver on all platforms anyway.

This app is so untruful in everything it says. it will tell you 0$ delivery fee for orders over 15$. My order is 17$ and its still charging me a 6$ delivery fee on top of "other" fees for 4$. I even have their subscription for no delivery fees. makes me wonder how long this has been going on without me noticing. Also they time it says it will take it not accurate at all its always double or more the time for me to actually get my food.

I have Uber One so you'd expect a decent service. Got a notification of an Uber One deal yesterday £6 off orders over £25. I used it for groceries (didn't have to but thought I had the discount) I applied the promo and double checked it was there before clicking pay. I was charged the full amount including the £6. I immediately contacted their support. They faffed for 24h before telling me how to apply a promo code which wasn't the issue. They are now ignoring me completely.

It seems like for certain places it never offers any bundled orders or doesn't offer any other places once you order from it to bundle with. also when you have a bundled order, it's never the same delivery person and splits it into two different deliveries which means I have to put more tip on it instead of sharing the tip between the two places.

This used to be a good app! The promotions are completely broken. I have used the same promotions before, so I know it's not user error, I read the requirements. Still, there is nothing I can do to get the promotion that is advertised, even though my order meets all requirements. I have a hard time believing they don't know about this. It's basically false advertising at this point, as I see the 'promotions' frequently, sometimes even get a notification about one, and yet they don't work.

Honestly, this app is probably the only decent way to get food delivered in my area cheaply, but it has tons of issues. I have had issues with drivers taking my food, ignoring my instructions, and the app forcing me to buy food from restaurants I didn't intend by not telling me the closer option doesn't do pickup anymore. This is as middle of the road as you can get for a delivery app, so use it cautiously.

paying Uber one for over a year, barely used it so probably could've went without it but it was for the convenience when we do need to order. past few orders the discounts never went through and the help desk "can't pass me onto people that can refund me" then send me a link to help links (no search results for compensation or refunds). Food went missing from one of my orders last year as well but no problem, this situation reminds me of airline companies trying their best to refuse refunds.

Had a free year thru capital one. Enjoyed the membership then it ended and I outright paid the year. No more promotional deals and if there are ones it's next to no savings or things I'd use. Was forced to pay a double order after canceling one and resetting it 2 minutes in and out of placing it. The app said it'd take a few days to refund then never refunded the money. If my bank reverses it I'll lose out on the current year membership, that again is devoid of offers. Maybe doordash next year.
I always love to purchase my daughters clothes here. The quality is very good and fits perfectly on them. I recommend this store 100%
good application. but play with limited...

Great app, great deals. My biggest gripe, however, is the weird bug(?) that causes orders to just... not be placed. Several times, including tonight, I've "ordered" food just to realize the order was never placed and it sent me straight back to the home page after I pressed the "place order" button. I usually have a super small window to order, so this often leaves me scrambling to make something to eat before work when I was hoping to just have something delivered.

My experience with Uber Eats has been usually good. Lately, my complaints when using this app on my Android phone (Samsung Galaxy Note 9) are that certain buttons like "Add To Basket", "Go To Checkout", "Save", "Order and Pay", etc., are all nearly covered by the navigation bar. I basically need to use my nail instead of my fingertips to press such buttons. Also, when I need to customize my tip, it's a hassle when I can't see the full amount while changing the tip. Please fix this. Thanks.

Uber Eats is useful when it works but any issue quickly becomes a nightmare. Customer service is non-existent - getting support is frustrating and often goes unresolved. I received an incomplete refund for a problem order, plus lost discounts and promos were never reinstated. A waste of time when things go wrong, with no accountability from the platform.

I am very disappointed with Uber Eats. While I above average get the things I requested for my orders, customer support is quite a hassle when it comes to offering refunds when you receive a different item than the one you requested or even worse missing the item you requested entirely! I tried to get a refund for 5 items I was missing when ordering through Uber Eats at a 7 Eleven store only for Uber Eats to constantly tell me I was uneligible for a refund! Absolutely ridiculous!!!

The keyboard gets stuck on the screen after searching for a restaurant. Too much of the screen is blocked by your paid options for the app. Once you add an item to the basket, the basket button stays in the bottom middle of the screen, makes it really annoyed to scroll for additional items. No dark mode. It's almost like the devs refuse to use their own app.

wow just incredible. after using this app once and seeing how deceptive it is I will never support a business like this. just insane how everything is set up. like the amount they charge on fees, not showing you the total when you have to click to pay, lying about promotions that were originally selected... I can tell this was really set up by some dirty dirtbag

My city has a reusable bag bylaw, so no single use plastic can be distributed. Since this change Uber has not given customers the ability to opt out of a reusable bag, meaning we get one every time we order. Drivers also leave quickly before you can try to hand it back. You don't even need a bag for smaller orders. The app doesn't show whether we are paying for these bags either. There needs to be an opt-out feature in check out.

Thought I'd give this app a chance as it was pretty late and i didn't have time to fix up a meal. Unfortunately my first experience was horrible and unprofessional. Placed an order nearly 2 hours before the establishment closed and then had to sit on the app and watch the driver sitting for an hour and not collecting my food and then being contacted by the establishment to phone the driver as they wanted to close which I found very unprofessional. Won't use again and the food was soggy and cold

App is alright, but it is an annoying nuisance that it pings me too frequently about ongoing orders. I am busy working and order some lunch, and I want to be notified exactly once: I want to only be interrupted with a ping from the app that the order has arrived or that it has been cancelled. If I order groceries I don't want to be bombarded with messages that the shopper Is working on my order, that I might be contacted for substitutions, that the driver is on the way to the store, ,....

Their quality and service has become extremely unprofessional and pathetic. Even the restaurants do not care for uber and send old rotten or stale food on uber. The delivery drivers take their sweet time to make sure the food is served cold. My last order was completely wrong and it didn't have a single thing I ordered and when I contacted uber support they refund me some of the amount and the agent had no idea what was going on and failed to provide any explanation or reason. Highly disappointe

App is easy to use & order ended up being a couple bucks cheaper than on doordash! Only negative...there was a $15.99 delivery fee that was waived, (unsure if it was waived because this is my first order), however if that is in fact the normal fee amount-- this will be my only order. I live only 3 miles from the restaurant & therefore not willing to pay more than $2.99(normal delivery fee on doordash). I guess we will see next time if that fee gets lowered or not.

I use this app for only kfc because the kfc app for delivery isn't working for where i am. I must say this app really helped me get deliveries at placed I can't get on other apps for some weird reasons. some drivers are good and nice, but some drivers can make a simple order really complicated sometimes. but other than that, I really enjoy using this app. It's really helping me out a lot.

I was very "ehh it's.. fine" on Uber Eats until I installed Grubhub... abysmal. now UE seems great 🤨 They keep giving me the free trials which are helpful for treating myself or long distance friends once or twice a month. Way WAY too over-charging to just order from on the reg. Never had huge problems, maybe from not using too often or only in cities, idk

It is truly astounding how buggy basic functionality can be, and how poorly errors are handled. Simply cannot fathom the scale of waste that goes into this app. If a payment method is declined you cannot retry it, it will automatically fail even if there's funds in the account. If you attempt to update an order and the card is declined for any reason, all it says is "unexpected error please try again". App is incapable of remembering what page you were on if you leave for more than a minute.

you will pay more in random arbitrary fluctuating "service fees" than you will in paying your service driver. I tried to get Google AI to make sense of it and it just thoroughly backs up how it helps us but doesn't explain why. then if you try to find out how to minimise it it firstly says to 1. either pick it up (making using uber eats completely redundant in the first place). or 2. add more value to the order as it goes off the value of the order. so I added a $10 item and the fee went up...

Sometimes its great, but a lot of the time the drivers that get assigned to pick up the food just dont go and get it and the app takes ages to reassign your order so by the time it arrives its freezing. Literally just placed an order and the driver 'picking it up' has been sat in a tesco car park for the past 10 minutes. I didn't order from tescos. There should be a way to request a new driver when you can see that the one assigned isn't doing what they need to.

DO NOT RECOMMEND "Cancel order" option is a complete scam to take your money. It doesn't matter how fast you cancel your order, the company will charge you either way AND you won't get any food. Better off just taking the wrong order. Their customer support is even more useless and complete garbage. Uber is going to have to remove their "cancel order" button, or add a warning that you've surpassed the refund window for order cancelation before I ever buy from them again.

I had to wait for my food for more than an hour, which should've taken 10 minutes to deliver. Another time, they couldn't even find a driver that I had to book a pickme to pick up my order. This happened to me more than 4 times and I'm here writing this review. Utterly disappointed! I better move off to some other competitor app rather than suffering here.

It's expensive, it's not doing a good job so far because of bad service on the restaurant behalf, also tax increase isn't helping no one either. Always something from the order is missing or sometimes it gets swap by something else that you didn't order. They need to step up or I'll step out to a better service. Update: They removed, the option to refund for wrong or missing items in the help chat and there's no other way to communicate than their email, but they won't respond. I uninstall it.

I had a very disappointing experience with this app. I ordered several items and returned 5 articles together. I received separate return pickup confirmation emails for all 5 items, along with tracking IDs showing that all of them were successfully delivered to the warehouse. While I have received refunds for 4 of the items, the app is not even showing the return status for the 5th item, and no refund has been issued yet. It has already been 20 days since the return.

The app is good and have no issues. The only problem is with the payment. They take so long to confirm the payment. And even after the payment and receiving messages that money is cut from my account, and i later get a mail stating that my order has been cancelled because of the payment. Odered something today again, and my payment was done, till now its showing payment is pending. Disappointed. The only reason why I'm giving it a 4 star.

Items get randomly canceled after order is placed and the amount is deducted and its the worst when you buy these items at the sale price. When I checked after a few hours, the items were very much in stock! And to top this, it's takes a lot of time (hours sometimes) to get connected to a customer agent over a call or via chat and they just keep saying it's an app glitch & to order again, without discounts. This has happened with 5 of my orders. Never placing an order on the H&M app again.

First of all, I didn't expect such a disastrous app from such a huge company. Recently, I can't open my app because it says some important services are missing, I am not sure what services as it does mention it. I have installed and uninstalled the app several times in different phones,it won't open. Secondly, If you don't shop for a few months (sometimes,more randomly and within hours),you are logged out automatically,when you log in, it's like a new account, your wishlist and bag is cleared.

This is the worst online shopping app! Everytime I place an order, my bank account is debited, but there is no payment confirmation. After a while, I receive a message saying the order has been cancelled because the payment could not he confirmed. This happened to me thrice. And once this happens, it is very difficult to get the money back. Multiple follow ups, calls, escalations later, they say they are unable to process the reversal. This is such a disappointment from such a huge brand!!

Hi, this is the worst online shopping app ever , don't purchase any products online because if your purchase online there's a high possibility that you may have to return or exchange the products, but guess what there's no exchange option available, on top of that their return process sucks you'll end up getting frustrated, sending emails to multiple parties for the refund and return request, they are not really available on calls,will be busy always. Can't really write much as there's a limit.

Those who buy H&m clothes should definitely download this app. • The app is easy to use, UI and functions are simple and straightforward. • The brand offers high discounts every now and then. • Delivery and return pick ups are hassle free. • The return amount is refunded within less time too. Dispatch may take a bit more time during popular sale periods but otherwise its quick. Also, there is no exchange service provided if there is any size or quality issue. You have to return the product.

please add exchange feature in your app. It is not user friendly to return items everytime even that job can be done by exchanging the item. After returning the item and ordering again sometimes it happens that the item gets out of stock or may be their price have changed. So exchange facility must be added as a feature in the app. Otherwise I loved all the items I had purchased so far. Quality wise they are very good.

Terrible experience. Recieved the wrong order. Upon returning, did not get the refund inspite of calling multiple times. It's been several months now. Placed another order recently. The money can debited. Later, the orders section shows that one of the items is not going to be delivered. I haven't received a single SMS after placing the order. I am also not able to track the order. This was the worst online shopping experience ever. Did not expect this from a brand this huge

I am so annoyed by this app. First off, it shows a message saying 'Important service is temporarily unavailable' most of the time. I cannot view my previous orders. This year, more than half of my orders are cancelled by the company. I literally wait for so long just to get a freaking message about half of my products that I order being cancelled? I am so done!

It's a fine online shopping app with an eash to navigate UI. I just don't understand why the app pauses any music, or media, I have playing in the background. Doesn't matter what app I'm streaming from, when I launch the app it pauses it!!

please work on the exchange and return option. the lack of exchange makes the process very bothersome and becomes one of the major reasons why a person might not want to order from the site as they might not be sure about size, sizing issues are very common anyway. otherwise, h&m has always been one of the best, mainly the jeans, trousers and basics. quality is just too good, as is the look.

only order from the app if you have enough patience and if you have lots of money because half of your money will be stuck till they refund it. The customer service is amazing they listen and give solutions. For every order you place your order gets cancelled 2-5 times until your order is actually placed. They will provide you with discount coupons for inconvenience but you might not be able to use it because your order will get cancelled when you place it and it gets used in the process.

In the recent sale of 2+1, I ordered 6 items in two separate orders. The order was prepaid. Soon I got two mails from hnm, both saying exactly one item from each of the order was out of stock. I checked on the site, both items are still available in the size i ordered. I spent hours looking for stuff on that sale, then i spent hours talking to customer service. Ultimately they charged me full price for 4 items, and sent me a 20% coupon claiming the other two items were in bad quality. Scam.

Simply horrible! Trust me when I say that I had the worst experience shopping in this online store. One out of the two items that I ordered is missing. And the other one came in XL when I ordered in XS. There isn't any customer service so I have no way of recovering my money! They give you a number which is not reachable and their social account is also unavailable. What is this?? And you CANNOT cancel orders from the app. I am thoroughly disappointed!

Very disappointed with the app and service and whoever designed it. I ordered a pants and the colour was different from the pictures shown in the app. I returned it, and i lost the voucher and member discount and the delivery charges which were not reversable. The least you could do is provide an exchange option? The discount voucher option is a scam, because the delivery charges are double the voucher. The customer service sucks. Very disappointed and never shopping from here again.

Every time I order from the app they either send wrong items or defective products. I am tired of the whole return & refund mess. And every time I order items during a sale my order is messed up and they expect me to place an order for missing/wrong items again and return the received ones. But by the time they respond the price has changed. Why should I pay extra for something I clearly ordered at a different price, just because they messed up? Extremely disappointed. Never ordering again.

1. Please fix your tracking system thats available in this app. Its useless and totally nonsense. No information it just brings out error message, thats it.. thats what it does and nothing else. Waste of time. 2 if products are being shipped you need to have the courtesy of who the carrier is, in bold,big and cleanly, rather than mashing it up in long chain of email, where customer wont even be able to read or to be noticed. 3. Order confirmation email please keep it short and meaningful.

Their app bugged out money got deducted and no refund from over a month. It's been so frustrating to deal with this that I don't ever wanna purchase anything from them. They have even mentioned it in their app that there is the issue of online payments on their Android app. Why is it hidden away in customer support? Normal user like me made the transaction. The order was never placed. Amount was deducted and now from over a month they are just fooling around with me, contacted em a dozen times.

H&M is a great brand, i love their materials, fit, finish the discounts are awesome. But, the app is ridiculously buggy, after paying for an order due to some "technical glitch" my order was changed to COD and was asked to pay again. Often items i receive are someone else's or something entirely different from what i ordered. Messing up orders so often leads to returns and their refunds take almost a month to reflect on your account. Terrible experience with the app overall. Not recommended.

Agree with all other users expressing dissapointment of the recent app design update and product showcase photos. The previous design was easy to navigate and straight forward in its approach. This new one has been frustrating and gives me the urge to leave the app. The photos don't help in seeing how the product really looks nor give tasteful (not runway) outfit ideas. The models are too fashiony and won't allow the clothes to be shown in a more "this is how it really looks" way.

It's really bad, and the list of reasons is longer than fits here. A product will be showing as available, but you won't be able to add it to your bag. You'll need to try multiple times, switch to a different size, before you pull it off. What should be the core funtionality is not working properly. If you try to check store availability, forget it. Despite all of their competitors having that option, H&M doesn't (and when they did, it didn't work). Overall, barely functioning.

After the app renewing my yearly membership, ALL my Garment Collection vouchers disappeared immediately, even though they had not expired yet. This has already happened twice, and there seems to be no way to recover them. Please review my account history and resolve this issue!

Do not buy any non-H&M items! Especially do not buy any rugs!!! If you have to return something like a rug they totally scam you and don't refund you. I lost 150 Euros and I called 6 times and submitted a complaint online 4 times and even with Klarna and did not get my money back. They scam you out of your money and lie to you about having to "contact the third party seller" every time you call even though they said that last time. My order was in December and still no money back in March.

This app avoids customers' feedback and requests for help by not adding the contact us section directly onto their app. instead, they want you to go all the way to their facebook/instagram page just for you to contact them. what a bullshit tactic to avoid responsibility from your users. also include a review section for your products so your other customers can know how shitty some of your products are.

H&M decor has totally transformed my home. My home is now an elevated art of design. The pieces I have found here cost hundreds of dollars in galleries. If you see something you like don't wait. Their pieces sell out very quickly.

I had the worst experience with the H&M app I placed an order and got no updates even after the delivery date passed I had to check multiple tabs and their delivery partner site to see it was delayed over 10 days with no attempt or notice Customer service blamed the delivery partner and asked me to wait 24 to 48 hours but still nothing Later they said refund will take around 14 days after return but there is no tracking or updates This was very frustrating I do not recommend using the H&M app.

The app keeps taking you back to the beginning every time you scroll down and check an item. When you go back, it sends you to the top instead of returning you to where you were in the list. This makes it very frustrating and wastes a lot of time because you have to scroll through items you’ve already seen again. Please fix this bug. Also, I really preferred the older design of the app. The new layout is more annoying to use and makes it harder to find items compared to before.

very bad experience.I had returned products with Hm tag through delivery limited after a month they are saying me that they had received non H and M product so they are not going to refund .I lost my money and also the products .

When the order is cancelled due to lack of stock or store pickup unavailable... whatever the case. H&M should notify customers via email as you with order confirmation. I was waiting and waiting, and if I didn't decide to check my H&M account I wouldn't have known that my order was cancelled. No explanation just order cancelled and payment reverted. Help us help you... keep us informed, it saves everyone time and stress.
best app for shopping. smooth experience. love their collection. one bug I have been experiencing is when I open favourites, it shows 0 items. again then I click on favourites, it opens.
Seemingly great app, but the vibration on every click on the app is very annoying. And there is no way to stop it. Please remove that and allow it as an option if people need it.
Can't navigate this new layout. I don’t want to look at "new in" "minimalist" etc. I'd like to navigate so say tops or jeans, for example. I gave up trying.

I do love H&M and have bought almost exclusively from them for at least 25 years,mostly online. However since loosing my free postage membership I don't buy much at all and don't have time to shop in physical stores in town.
My German is not great and I am unable to change the language or take screen shots so I can translate the text making it very difficult to navigate. please make this easier!

Very poor post-purchase service from H&M. My return was delivered to their warehouse 45 days ago, but the refund is still not processed. I have contacted customer support multiple times and only receive generic replies with no clear resolution or timeline.
Awful app, horrible browsing experience because it doesn't save your spot. It automatically rolls to the top every time you click on a product. Garbage.

This is a nice app, offering prices that are far more competitive than on the other marketplaces. However, the risk of receiving a defective item (or one that doesn't match the advertised description or photos) is significantly higher here. And even in such cases, Temu's policy is quite accommodating; they readily issue refunds if a customer isn't satisfied with their purchase for any reason. But the amount of spam featuring various "discounts" and endless animations is overwhelming.

I was dubious at first but decided to try because of all the cool and different items you can't buy mainstream. Mostly I have been very happy with my purchases. A few times I have received a defective item ie spelling errors on a 12 month calender I bought or the thermal labels I ordered didn't have all the colours that were advertised in the 6 pack but the returns process is very simple and quick. I always request a credit to my account rather than a refund to put towards my next order.

Constant animations for deals with frustrating T&C's. I open the app and have to skip loads of them, to a point where I wonder why I opened the app in the first place and close it without purchase (so useful in some ways to save money) Once you get past that opening barrage, the app is useful and easy to use. But the bloating of the app is irritating, to the point where I'd cut it to 2 stars from 4 because of it.

I do enjoy this site as it has plenty to offer. Of course you pay for what you get ( cheap and tacky ) but you also come across some gold items and they work well. Just remember when purchasing items it can take along time to get delivered and on the app you are submitting to lots of benefits and promotions but just keep clicking the X's to close, job done.

One of the best online shops that I ever used. Fair prices, the variety of products is beyond expectation, fantastic and polite support, tracking orders in a way that you know what is the each stage of your parcel, and other features are the ones that each customer is looking for. Downsides: Manipulative promotions. Never use them ! not even once. it's fraud! even when the parcel took longer than it's written, they pay $5 on paper! it's an absolute lie!

They say they'll give you good discounts and for all intents and purposes the items they sell are usually cheap. But they make you jump through dozens of hoops to get them. If I could give any less stars I would but this system requires I at least a single star to make a review. 0/10 I will ACTIVELY tell everyone to avoid.

I'm addicted!!

I'm very disappointed and have lost trust in this platform. Not recommended.

I love temu.... you can find just about anything. most products are worth checking out...as for the FREE stuff you get offered, you MUST purchase X amount of dollars to get anything so there for Nothing is free. It's super easy to use. After ordering if an item decreases in price you can ask for a price adjustment and add it to your credit balance. I've ended up being able to buy other items using just the price adjustment credits. Deliveries are pretty quick also, and as long as you order a minimum $ amount ($35 or $20 sometimes), the delivery is free. It means the price of the item is what you pay, not like Aliexpress where you have to constantly watch what the shipping charge will be.

I have been shopping with Temu for over 2yrs now, and I have bought everything from clothes to blankets. Their prices are hard to beat, and then they give other discounts to regular customers. The quality of the items on sale are usually of a high standard, and if there are any issues, the customer service team are quick to sort it out.

I've gotten some really cute & pretty things from here. Ive purchased pet items & household things as well. The prices are reasonable but sometimes quality suffers because of it...read the item description carefully. When you are searching for your next great find Temu will push you a little to hurry up & buy items giving you a time limit to get your shopping done in order to receivethe discounted price. I dont like this but it may not bother others. The return process can be daunting at times

A message popped up offering 3 items for €0.01. After confirming my selection, I was told I must place an order for €25 to receive them. Then another pop-up required an additional €15 order. Then another 18 euro.... The conditions kept changing step by step. This feels very misleading and dishonest. A classic bait-and-switch experience. Extremely disappointed. 👍 UPDATE 2: I've been using Temu for a couple of years and still have no complaints. 👍 UPDATE I've been using Temu for just almost a year and bought many, many things. I am still giving it 5⭐! Temu has been slacking over the past year. They make you wait for two weeks before shipping your items; late arrivals and even cancellations. If you cancel immediately they put a hold on it. Beauty supply stores are better. Some products arrive damaged or they give you what they want to.

So, you share and invite and there's often glitches where your friend will follow your link and it still won't give you the credit toward your free items, or it cuts the credit you get in half every time someone clicks your link. Updating my review, keeping it at 2 stars because I still don't trust the Canadian taxes they're charging are genuine. I still use the app, and it is my goto when I'm looking for something specific, but it still pays to shop around sometimes. No complaints, just don't get trapped in the rabbit hole.

The customer PAYS for an item -> Receives an EMPTY box -> The support team says; "I understand your point of view. Very convenient app for ordering daily essentials. I’ve been using regularly, and it’s been really helpful. You can order anything from groceries, snacks, and laundry items to even pharmacy essentials. The best part is the speed—most of my orders were delivered within 8–12 minutes, consistently! Whether it was early morning or late at night, the service was reliable and efficient every single time. The app is easy to use, and the quick delivery makes a huge difference in daily life.

Absolute disaster of an app. For an order 'they' made a mistake of sending one product instead of another. For that single order, we have been trying get a resolution since 3 days. eBay used to show when a Best Offer was accepted with a crossed-out price and ‘Best offer accepted,’ making it easy to see real sale prices. Now it only shows ‘or Best Offer’ with no confirmation or final price. This change makes it harder to gauge value and feels like a step backward. I’d much rather see the actual accepted prices again.

Overall good experience. Only issue is, I have money available from selling items and the app will not allow me to send the money to myself. I was able to do it before on the current card. I tried adding a card and even my bank account, that does absolutely nothing. I got emails saying the banking and card info updated, but not when I go to send the money to those accounts. Now they're just holding my money.

garbage app that constantly crashes and never shows the whole page. every time it updates it gets worse. I'm waiting for the rest of whatever purchases I made to arrive,(IF they arrive...),and then I'm done with ebay. it was a good ride for the first decade or so but I'm tired of being ripped off. buyer protection is 100% meaningless. none of my friends are having trouble with the other big platform so I guess I'll give those guys a shot. at least I know I'll receive what I pay for...

it's OK. not nearly as useful as desktop site. when selling, lots of options just don't show up. I get daily notifications for deals but when I actually sell items I don't find out until I get a late notice to ship my item saying the item sold weeks prior. buying items on the app is simple and easy, not so much selling. and finding previous conversations with sellers and buyers on here is like a corn maze nearly impossible to find. reviewing because im tired of ebay asking me to rate the app

Very annoying that size isn't included in "about this item" for clothes (it's hidden behind the expand button) but "size type" is included. So shopping for clothes I know that everything uses a "regular" sizing system but need to deep dive each item to see what size it is. I tried to use the help system, but there is no avenue for "help with app" or "other topic" in the contact/help menu, and the only feedback link I could find was specifically for the eBay help info pages.
Love this app! So easy to use, and helps me track my workouts. Highly recommended

As a small seller, my recent experience has been frustrating. I dispatched an item on time using 2nd Class with proof of postage, but the buyer opened an “item not received” case just days later. Because it was untracked, the refund was taken from my funds despite Royal Mail delays. Sellers should be aware that estimated delivery dates can trigger cases very quickly, and without tracking, seller protection is extremely limited. Buyer protection is strong, but seller protection is horrible.

When eBay works, it is fine, but the amount of times an update leaves it bug ridden is ridiculous. The latest update now has issues with the search function; a fundamental part of eBay. If the bugs were a one off, it would be understandable, but it seems to be standard for them. No wonder they're losing so many customers to Vinted and Facebook Marketplace. Ebay has been going downhill for years and the app is exactly the same. Greedy company with a limited lifespan. They've been left behind!

The buying experience is not great, but the selling experience put me off of eBay forever. constant server failure messages when trying to add payment information. auto-relisting items when they don't sell. option to add a buy it now price hidden. charging fees after poor performance. not just buyer beware, but also seller beware. ebay has gone way downhill from what it used to be.

The app's been generally fine but a couple of weeks ago they changed something in the way it treats the Gboard input in the search box which is infuriating! Now, if you want to add text in the middle of an existing search term, the cursor defaults to the end of the search term after every character input, making it much much harder to edit a search term. Uninstalling and reinstalling the app hasn't fixed it, nor has clearing Gboard data and the problem doesn't present in any other apps.

I cant leave a good review when they don't get rid of scam accounts. its a good app, but they just let people get scammed all the time. really unfortunate. i shop here all the time and know what to look for but im always concerned that one day i will miss something. be careful. edit: still loads of scam accounts. nothing has changed. the app itself is great. but buying on ebay is dangerous for those who dont know what to look for.

Constantly 'reminded' to leave feedback~I'll leave feedback,but only if I want to & it will always be honest.I won't change/remove it if a seller doesn't agree. Multiple postage charges from same seller~sending all items together&saving on postage,but charging full amount,as if sending separately.Why isn't there an auto discount on postage rates? Default location~manually changing this to the UK every single search! you have access to my GPS,why isn't this automatic/saved?

Generally the app is okay, but I have one major gripe. I've often come across items that are poorly described, sometimes in a way that appears to be misleading buyers. A recent one was an xbox series S listed as a series X. The latter is more powerful and expensive, so more desirable. I reported this, only to be told that it isn't a violation. This seems completely inexplicable and there's no way to then respond to Ebay's decision. So no way to challenge a possibly fraudulent listing.

Great to buy on, horrible to sell on. I sold an item on here which was refunded to the buyer, but I never got my item back. Ebay said I owed them money for the refund, on top of me never getting my item back! It wasn't something cheap either. 6 months of constant phone calls later... Still stuck. And they're trying to get the debt collector on me. I have been as transparent as possible and made so many efforts to move this case. If you get scammed as a seller on ebay, they do NOT have your back.

Terrible seller UX. Can't select multiple shipping options, sometimes the description gets lost, and no for the last time I don't want to promote my item just list the damn thing and stop begging for more money. And stop with the AI description garbage. I don't want to use it, buyers either don't care or are actively turned off, and it's just useless fluff. Seriously, it'll be a cold day in hell when I voluntarily give up 10% more of the sale price on top of the ridiculous fees.

eBay is one of the worst platforms for sellers. Buyers apparently have all the power. You can prove they're lying via messages, and then they can lower your rating without even receiving a product. Why are buyers allowed to rate a product when it's been canceled for legitimate reasons. They will not back you as a seller. It's great if you're a buyer, but it's terrible if you're a seller. You have no protection, just the illusion of it. Be warned. I'm going to move over to PayPal and Mercari.

Dropped android 9 or lower support without any warning to users. Many will find that they'll no longer be able to use the app anymore unless they buy a new phone. Despite the apps flaws it was handy to use it to take pictures and scan barcodes to speed up creating listings. Guess I won't be doing that anymore, which will result in less items for sale from me as using the mobile site for this is much slower.

I can change notification settings now. I disabled notifications for ebay lives and I still get them! also I reported an item for manipulating search results, listing with the wrong item condition (i.e listed as "pre-owned" but the title and desc. say "for Parts&Repair") got an email saying the AI didn't find anything despite that the item name in the same email said "PARTS ONLY". yes, it's in all caps in the item name. How did this go over the AI's head?! Stop giving me tiny shipping labels!!

Update 05/03/25: As a part-time seller, using the app primarily, I have to bring this down from 5 to 3. The new "updated" seller interface was completely unnessesary, & just plain bad. It turned a one-page interface into 4-5 seperate pages. Months later, after major bug fixes the formatting is still terrible, causing the buyer to scroll left & right to read each section/paragraph as one long line. I wish we could simply opt back to the former seller interface! You fixed what wasn't broken. 😢

App is a buggy mess. "Simple delivery is anything but" simple. As a seller you can't alter postage prices to cover your packing costs, so you have to recycle whenever possible. If you receive an offer from a seller, you can't accept it from the app, AT ALL! Only on PC. If you list an item, DO NOT upload a video. Doing so instantly makes the app crash EVERY. SINGLE. TIME. When you try to open the app again, it throws a temper tantrum, that YOU DARED UPLOAD A VIDEO in the first place. Madness!
Two workouts a week free. Pathetic

Endless irrelevant notifications, which makes it almost impossible to follow the things I am actually interested in. Well known problem, widely talked about online. eBay purposely bundles settings so there is no way to keep the ones you're interested in without the spam. Worse, the settings section of the app is just completely broken. I will be turning off eBay's permission to send any notification at all, and if that renders the app useless, I'll uninstall.

Yard sale eBay is dead. eBay is flooded with China sellers, shipping fees, delayed China shipping. Selling has never been worse. I sold some very clean valuable items on here that at worst should have sold for around 1000. I netted less than 500 with the fees and shipping costs. Once someone bids on an item you can't update your listing, even if it's better for the buyers. Stick to marketplace. I've been using eBay a long time and I'm hanging it up.

Simple and easy to use. I can find almost anything I want here and have the option to go for new, used, old or auctioned. And not forgetting the ability to shop UK EU or even further abroad for rarer items. Purchases backed by the eBay guarantee give some peace of mind when making purchases. As always this does not mean that due diligence can be overlooked.

notifications not coming straight through when items sell, can be up to 12 hours sometimes. not good when you have despatch time set to 24hrs. "enter password" "now enter code texted to you" a few seconds of loading then "enter password" "now enter the code texted to you" etc etc. 5 times. in fact the only solution in the end was to use desktop pc

So today I log in to the ebay app and it says I need an update as my version is no longer supported. When I go to update it's not an option (I assume my OS is no longer supported). Been using ebay for decades, guess I'm not anymore. Seems ridiculous that you would prevent people from using the app when that is how you make money. Weird.

Good between individuals. But there's no customer service help, even if you're a plus member & AI help is hopeless. If you order by accident & immediately try to cancel, the shop sellers will ignore you and send the product, and AI will tell you it's already sent even 5 minutes after purchase. Meanwhile eBay suggests the seller will be sitting around for 3 days and then decide to cancel and they provide no way for you to message a human other than the seller. Shop anywhere else if you can!

Overall, this is a great app. I only wish that I was able to access more of my purchase history in it. Overall, it's a great app for eBay, and I find it easy to use, and resourceful. I love shopping with it. there are a few restrictions I'm not happy about, tbh. buyers need to be protected too, not only sellers. ebay is seller focused, so if you buy and it goes bad, you can't do anything. it's unfair.

The new selling interface is so bad. It just boggles the mind that these tech companies feel the urge to make these changes; it was completely functional before and now you've made it so much less intuitive.

For as long as I remember it has been getting worse and worse with every update. Not to mention holding MY funds back. Now 'simple' shipping without negotiation and an address glitch have combined to make sending items physically impossible. It's been a long time coming but uninstalling.

Love this app a lot and use it very frequently. My only critique is that I would love the ability to block certain sellers. A year ago the app consistently gave me notifications when something sold. In 2025 it hardly ever gives item sold notifications. I turned off emails to keep my inbox cleaner and the app notification were just easier. I am using the latest version and have even tried to uninstall and reinstall and the bug persists.

In 2021 I gave them 1 star. They addressed many problems, so in 2022, 4 stars. On May 25, 2023, the app was sailing, 5 stars. Jan 2024, it started downhill. The new search is useless for coins. Before, with modifiers, you could zero in on an exact coin. Not anymore. Mint marks, dates, and grade are ignored producing many useless results with very few, if any, correct. It is worse than Amazon. The new messenger blows, and gets delayed. There are no longer knowledgeable people reviewing reports.

The latest eBay Live Auctions has its perks, but the latest update has made replaying live auctions buggy and even during a live auction the audio continues to cut out. another concern is in live auctions, you can't take screenshots on your mobile phones. it would make remembering what you won in a live auction easier if you could do that, I'm not sure why you even can't.

Here we go again. Another update to the UI so I have to get familiar with the layout - AGAIN! More empty white space; even bigger buttons the size of balloons; more scrolling because only 2 or 3 results are fully viewable on screen. A more tiresome experience. The functionality of the open app is good. But the alerts feature, one of the most important features, barely works at all. I get Ending Soon alerts too late. I've been very impressed with Ebay recently, the only problem is having to keep uninstalling the app when I get a certain error message as it won't allow me to save my listing otherwise. I have had to jump through hoops to make an offer and buy an item. I had to ring and they said you have to buy an item outright. Positive 👍 Zomato is very convenient and user-friendly. The app has a wide variety of restaurants, detailed menus, and helpful customer reviews, making it easy to choose food. Absolutely loving the Zomato app! 🍽️ The interface is super smooth, ordering food is quick, and the real-time tracking makes it so convenient. Zomato is a very convenient app for ordering food and exploring restaurants. The interface is easy to use, and you can quickly browse menus, reviews, and ratings. Has gone down hill This app used to be good but have had issues lately. Most recent is waited several hours for an order, they kept changing the delivery time. This used to be a great app, does exactly what you need it to do. However, the map has changed and now instructs the driver to go to an incorrect address and cannot be changed.
