So in short, customer support is awful!

Just Eat charge you 11% for every item you buy and if something is then discovered out of stock when the shop is packing, they do not refund the 11% charged for the item. They refund the cost of the item but not the 11% charge. Be warned. I also hate how difficult it is to contact customer service. They have a few preset options so if you want to contact them about something else, you can't. Of all major couriers, just eat is the most awkward for customer support.

In my area, there are 214 restaurants for which the app advertises a "50% off (up to £15) when you spend £15" deal. For all the places I've tried, this deal is never applied, even when I get to the part where I need to pay. If this deal doesn't exist, then the app shouldn't advertise it. Customer service is incredibly hard to speak to, and no-one I've messaged showed any sign that they actually looked at my issue. I'm trying to report a potential bug, but all the responses I get are generic.

So, so bad. They took a £75 order from me, delivered £10 worth of food, and when I went through the refund process for the missing food, I was just told I wasnt getting one. I spoke with the restaurant and they said there was nothing they could do until they were contacted by just Eat to confirm the claim was legit.... they were never contacted. Save your money, and use deliveroo or uber eats.

scammy app. I had account credit that I was going to use on an order, and when I backed out of the checkout to double check the order details it took away my account credit and there is nowhere on the app to contact anyone about getting it back. the help tab just has a page talking about where to view your credit and nothing about contacting anyone about issues. Appalling customer support and I will not be using the app again until I can get that account credit back.

The policy says that if you have a scheduled order for next day or in hours, you can add products to the order by scheduling it in same time slot before it is packed. I tried it on website and app both. it does not work. It asks for new delivery charge despite it not being a quick order.

After being an avid user, spending around £50 a week minimum I received a cold and late order from McDonald's over an hour's after it's estimated time. I can see the food was picked up from the restaurant at 01:27 via it's ticket yesterday didn't arrive for a further 50 minutes. id recommend turning to Uber eats, at least you can properly get in touch with customer support and food arrives in a timely manor.

I chose a restaurant based in it having a 15-30 minute delivery window. After the restaurant accepting it, the delivery estimate immediately jumped to over 50. I was unable to cancel the order as it had been accepted. I didn't receive my food until 2 and a half hours later. The driver from the restaurant said that JustEat won't let them put a longer inital estimate and they get complaints all the time. It is false advertising. JustEat refused to issue a refund because the food was delivered.

The platform allows dodgy restaurants to serve food! I didn't realise I was ordering from a less than three star kebab! the food quality was terrible, some of it was completely overcooked. some of it was raw! spent about 40 pounds! Just to find out, I wouldn't even feed that meat to my dog! spoke to justeat and they refused to refund me even though I took a photo of the uncooked meat! And I couldn't carry on eating for the rest of the evening and had stomach problems! The zero customer service!

Always had good experiences before this. Everything seems automated that if something goes wrong it's impossible to talk to someone to get it fixed. The app said my food was delivered, so I messaged them if they were nearby, got no response. The ai chat bot is unhelpful at best. I sent an email to just eat to explain what's happened. I've only got the automated response that they've recieved it, 11+ hours ago. Update: 14 hours later they've decided to do nothing about their mistake!

Just Eat used to have pretty good customer service is something went wrong, but now they're awful. My latest delivery was not received because their driver did not show up at the restaurant. I called the restaurant but they had no way to chase the courier, and when I finally got hold of Just Eat they refused to give me a refund. This is not the first problem I've had with them recently so I'll be closing my account.

They added expensive service fees, subscription packages, and even higher prices from restaurants. It has become a massive rip off, and I can practically only order from a handful of places that kept their prices low. Of course, inflation didn't help, but their customer service has also gone downhill in recent years. Customer supports is nonexistent and you're out of money if there are issues. Avoid!

Courier was able to mark the order as delivered even though there's a code needed and he never showed up. The app doesn't have an option to report this, once the order is marked as delivered then the customer can't report it missing. So you're left to file a complaint and wait days for support and argue for a refund of something that you never received.

READ THIS. THIS APP IS THE WORST OF THE BIG THREE. you will never be able to challenge a late order or claim the money back. I had to wait TWO HOURSSS!! for my food, and when I wanted to cancel or challenge the restaurant, I still had to pay full price regardless. I was advised to "leave a review" lool. the APP has just seriously fallen behind to the other two big apps in delivroo and ubereats. in all aspects, technically and everything.

Use a different provider. I have used this service for several years and there have always been occasional issues with driver availability. However, there are no longer options to contact customer service or cancel orders. This is painful after being kept waiting for over an hour. When you speak to the restaurants the food is ready it is a Just Eat driver problem. No customer service channel or options in the app means no resolution. Not a fan of being charged for a service that's not delivered

Horrible customer service experience. I made my first order and several items in my order were not correctly prepared. but what was most frustrating was that one item I received was a snack size item worth half the price of the item I actually paid for. I used the help button on the order to let Just Eat know about the mistakes, but they refused to refund the amount I overpaid. Other delivery services have been great about helping if orders are wrong, but Just Eat makes no effort. Don't use

Avoid like the plague. Unlike it's competitors, Just Eat's customer service is non-existent. I had an order that was not delivered, I simply got a notification saying it had been and was left hungry and twiddling my thumbs on my doorstep. Tried to contact Just Eat, that's the first hurdle. Used the app and I got an email saying they would get back to me in a couple of days. That was a couple of weeks and 3 submissions on their useless app. Seems I won't be getting my money back any time soon.

Just Eat UK won't even deal with a complaint so I would avoid avoid avoid!!! I placed the order at 7.02. It had an estimated delivery time of 7.50pm (35-50 mins). Order was finally delivered at 8.41pm. The food was cold to the point that the melted cheese had solidified completely. A lot else was wrong too Complained straight away it's now been 5 days and multiple "customer service" reps. Still no refund.... disappointed!

The app sends false "delivered" notifications while you are still waiting for your food. My order was nearly an hour late, yet Just Eat refused a refund despite clear breaches of consumer law. Their "support" is just a series of automated rejections. Use a different platform that actually respects its customers.

I ordered food yesterday and I received the wrong item. I proved to just eat that my meal was incorrect. picture evidence, receipts. and they refused to issue a refund for the missing meal that I didn't receive and then kept repeating we can't help. customer service is terrible. the fact I'm a paying customer. and didn't receive what I paid for. got no help at all.

Accidentally ordered a delivery to the wrong address. You can't change the address in the app, nor can you cancel the order. Then they claim your order has been delivered, the courier made multiple attempts to contact you, and the order is outside your door. All lies.
Best app for training in a right way, in gym either at home! Thank you

Absolutely fuming after waiting over an hour asked the driver and he said he'd cancelled it when he got thr store ive now had to order from somewhere else recieving some food 2 hours after orginally ordering. It's completely unacceptable and frankly im appaled. What's the point in ordering something if nothing is going to come and youre not going to be updated reasonably. Horrific.

Won't be using again. I've been a customer for many years, however we waited an hour for an order and then they cancelled it. no explanation given. Contacted customer service whom lied about the reason for the cancellation as I had visited the store myself. when confronted with the lie they refused to provide anything as a show of Goodwill. Dont use, they don't care about their customers. Pure greed.

Everything is perfect until You have any issues with your order. My complaint with automated chat ended up with no solution. My order was missing an item and I just wanted to get money for this one back. I was trying to reach any kind of customer service but I couldn't find any email address, or chat with a real assistant. Finally I got answer from someone in Just Eat promising me that my refund is on the way and it will take 5-7 working days. It is 10 days later and still no money. No thanks!

honestly I'm not sure why I bother at this point. The driver stole half my food. I contacted the restaurant and they confirmed they'd sent 3 bags but I only received 1. the driver was parked down the wrong street for 10 minutes. it's clear he took the food. I have contacted them again and they're refusing to do anything about it, despite the restaurant telling me to request a refund. only use this app if you're okay with the drivers stealing your food and you never getting your money back.

Ordered some lunch that was meant to arrive in 20mins. 1h20 still no food. When the rider did turn up, he does not have our food and tries to give us someone else's food. We refused it. Raised a complaint with Just Eat, they said a photo is needed and we don't meet the requirements for a refund. Just Eat is nothing but a scam avoid at all cost. I would recommend Deliveroo. it's a better App and more importantly better customer service

I don't use Just Eat very often but when I do I seem to have a problem! I ordered on 21/04/26 and part of my order was missing, I was told I would get a refund to my bank account within 7 days. It's now 9 days later and I still haven't received my refund and all the bot says is the same message. So, clearly I have been robbed by Just Eat!

Update: 28/04/2026. Ordered McDonald's from Just Eat, they missed the big mac I ordered, Just Eat didn't give me a refund, when I had to go back on the app to check the rest of my items Just Eat wouldn't give me a refund. Horrible service! Will not use now, when you order an item the way you want, you should get want you wanted/ordered!!! Don't use Just Eat if they can't check properly for themselves, when restaurants mess up your orders!!!

Terrible customer service. I placed a food order. When it finally arrived it was stone cold and had to be binned. The restaurant admitted it was their fault but just eat first offered a tiny credit and when I said I wanted refunding said it's their policy to not refund you. They won't share the exact policy and claim they've investigated but won't share those details either. The app is great until you have a problem then their policy is to never help.

They now hide the hygiene rating and app is so difficult to use compared to how it used to be. We ordered then were disgusted that the hygiene rating was 1. Upsells are around every corner, clutter the app and are easy to click by mistake. Lots of added charges, costs, etc hidden until the end; bag fees, opaque service charges, the like. They added tipping but in the worst way possible. The ratings of the restaurants are definitely not in line with reality, & in-app reviews are not transparent.

Very disappointing experience with the Just Eat app. My order was delayed for over 1.5 hours and then marked as delivered, but I never received it. The restaurant later confirmed it was delivered to the wrong address. Despite this, Just Eat refused to issue a refund and repeatedly sent template responses saying their decision was final. Very poor customer service and dispute handling. I would not recommend using this service based on my experience. I lost 21 pounds for their unprofessionalism.

Overall a good app with an easy to use interface and a good range of restaurants, supermarkets and shops to order from. However the delivery time estimates are very bad as I just had grocery delivery from a supermarket 5 minutes away, yet it took over an hour to arrive. When I have to pay ridiculously high service fees on top of other fees, I expect a much better service. I will be using deliveroo instead. If I was just reviewing the service provided rather than the app, I would give only 1 star

still waiting for customer services to contact me but have been sent a form to fill out about how they helped me resolve something that's not been resolved, ordered food, never arrived and now just eat are impossible to contact and taking their time to contact myself, spent £30 quid, no food, no updates, no apologies. Once resolved will not be using again terrible customer service and no way of sorting issues other than some stupid messages, I would like refunded for the non delivery.

We placed an order for Papa Johns, 5 an hour and a half, I rang the restaurant only to be told we were outside the delivery range. The restaurant accepted and completed the order without ever delivering the order. We tried to refund this order through Just Eat and the restaurant multiple times and have been refused each time. We still haven't got our money back, and their refusals to refund us are criminal. Do not use this app.

I would give this 0 star as they are awful and scammers! I ordered a alcoholic bottle and not only was it late but the whole bottle I spend £25 was replaced with WATER!!! there customer service has been so unhelpful as I can only seem to get through to a robot, which can't give me a straight answer! Delete this app while you still can and use Deliveroo instead.

It's so annoying to use now compared to other food delivery apps, no one wanted supermarkets to show up to begin with but it's even more annoying when you're searching for sushi or ribs and actual restaurants are hidden, so please just let us hide supermarkets in our preferences. Introduce the Restaurants only mode please.

Thieving couriers! You place an order. The order is declared to be on its way. You can track the courier as they near your home. The courier unexpectedly declares the items delivered, half way there and steals your order. There needs to be a better vetting process for couriers and actual accountability in case they decide to disappear with your paid for goods. I've had this happen a bunch of times now.

low prices and quality is ok ok the problem is delivery time. they can't handle multiple orders and it's better not order food using this app because they can't keep up with the demand and don't be surprised if the delivery gets delayed by 90 mins. they don't have professional support team. they don't pick up the calls and no proper resolution is provided in chats. the chat agents keep repeating their 2 lines saying sorry. other than that nothing can be done by them. Very disappointed

Absolutely frustrating experience. Almost every time I open the app, restaurants are either “not delivering” or items are “sold out.” This has been happening continuously for the last 3 days. A food delivery app should actually let customers order food, not constantly show unavailable restaurants and unavailable items. Focus on fixing restaurant availability and inventory management instead of just running the platform. Very disappointing service.

Really disappointed with the EatClub app. Every single time I try to order whether it’s morning, afternoon, or evening almost all the restaurants are unavailable or not accepting orders because they’re overloaded. It’s become a constant issue. Every option shows the same problem, which makes the app extremely unreliable.What’s the point of listing so many restaurants if none of them are actually available when needed? This really needs to be fixed.

95% of the menu is always sold out! Delivery takes a long time compared to other delivery apps. Discounts are one of the best in class. But unavailability of items is a big drawback of this app, keeps me away from this app! Please send your details on WhatsApp is again a scam, it's been more than 1 day and I have had no response whatsoever!

The worst food delivery app. Getting orders in about 2 hours is one thing... they have stopped customer care number.... the chat customer support people end the chat repeatedly when asked to cancel the order and give a refund even if order is more than an hour late. What use is the order which is "prepared" but not getting delivered. On the other hand, they have cancelled order after 30-40 mins without any good explanation. DO NOT accept orders if you can't fullfil them! Never using them again.

This app advertises “no packing charges, no delivery charges, and no platform fees,” but once you add items to the cart, all these charges suddenly appear. That’s misleading and feels dishonest. If there are additional costs, they should be shown upfront instead of surprising users at checkout. This kind of pricing tactic breaks trust and creates a frustrating experience. Please be transparent with your customers.

firstly I used to get my orders on time, but now it is delayed for hours, when I try to reach out customer service it's just ai bot and i can't do anything but wait for a long time... they say esteemed time is 20-30 mins but I have to wait for almost 2hrs.... the food is really good but eatclub you have to do something about the time. and it's not just about one order it's for every order. and i don't even order from a place that's far from me.

There is NO CUSTOMER SUPPORT. Yes, that is right. If your order is stuck during delivery for some reason, you will not be getting your money back and there will be zero options to reach out to any support. Everything in the "chat" option leads to automated refusals. Same with WhatsApp. I did reinstall the app for the occasional collective order at my workplace but I always inform people of this risk before the order.

I've been ordering from EatClub for a while now and honestly, it never disappoints. What I love most? Great food without burning a hole in your pocket — EatClub truly understands budget-friendly eating. Their pizza is an absolute favourite of mine — the flavours are spot on, every single time. If you haven't tried it yet, you're seriously missing out. Highly recommend! 🤌

One of the pathetic apps, I have ever come across. You order, they show 45 minutes delivery, in case the order is delayed you won't get any option to connect them. As their automated chat reply will not give you the option to enter any word there and connect to a real person. At delayed they usually deliver the cold food, which is bad in taste and hygiene also. NOT RECOMMENDED AT ALL.

This app is a total waste of time. They show one price while browsing and a completely different price at the final checkout. They advertise "Free Food" to trick users, but then add heavy delivery and packing charges that make it even more expensive than regular orders. Very dishonest pricing and transparent bait-and-switch tactics. Do not download!

Very pathetic service and a poorly designed app. There is practically no customer support available. I mistakenly placed an order at the wrong address and there was no option to update or correct the delivery address. I tried contacting customer support multiple times but received no response at all. Eventually, I had no choice but to cancel the order without any refund, which means both my money and time were wasted. PLEASE NOT TO CONSIDER THIS APP EVER!!!!!

One of the most bogus food app. They have quality issues with food. I was served food with rotten vegetables and chicken multiple times. The worst part is their delivery. The app will show that the food will be delivered in 30 mins. But most of the time it is delayed, delayed by almost 30 mins to 1 hour. They play a cheap game of showing a higher food price and reducing it through some offers. But remember that the food quality as well as their delivery are cheap.

POOR POOR POOR POOR SERVICE ---I placed an order with an initial delivery time of 41 minutes. Just as the timer was about to end, it reset again to 41 minutes. This is extremely frustrating and misleading. Additionally, there is no clear way to contact customer support through the app, which makes the situation even more unacceptable. Please clarify the actual delivery time immediately or cancel the order and initiate a refund.
It's the best app ever and the support team is fast to make improves. Tks

Customer service is poor, also the app misleads the order status. In chat, it says delivery partner assigned, even after 15 min of that message, I don't see any delivery partner on the tracking page. Their manual agents have just one sentence, we are trying to deliver in the next 20-25 min. this 20-25 min stays the same even after you recheck again after 30 min. How come it is rated as highest food delivery app!

The app initially offered great deals, fast deliveries, and a smooth user interface, making it a pleasant experience. However, one incident broke my trust. I placed an order that was never delivered, and there was no customer care number to contact—only an email option. I was informed that my refund would be credited within 5–7 working days, but the issue occurred on December 19 and I still haven’t received it. A good app needs reliable customer support to truly help users

I have been a loyal customer of EatClub for many years and have regularly ordered food without any issues. However, I’m very disappointed to see that suddenly my area has been marked as “undeliverable.” The surprising part is that the EatClub outlet is just 2.2 km away from my location, yet I’m unable to place an order. It doesn’t make sense that such a short distance falls outside the delivery range. As a long-time customer, this feels unfair and frustrating.

Again...a pathetic experience with the customer service of this app.I ordered the food, no update on app, even after 1.5 hours of placing the order. Called customer care, no one picked up the call. In the end, I dropped an email to cancel the order as there was no update from their end by when the order will be delivered. And I received a reply that since you have cancelled the order, no refund will be provided. I am not going to order from this app again. Highly disappointed.

Extremely poor customer experience. My order was delayed by more than 30 minutes, and when I tried to contact support, the chat was closed with an automated message before I could even explain the issue. I was not given a chance to provide context or cancel the order. This lack of proper customer support and accountability is very frustrating

Please don't use this app at all, the high review is most probably bought. When launched the app was great but now the order never comes on time, either restaurant is closed or after 1 hour suddenly my food ordered is out of stock. You've to do so much just to connect with customer representative on chat and on call they just stall you. Dogshit app and services, just use other delivery apps.

The food quality is genuinely world-class. The taste, packaging, and portion size are excellent and clearly show that the restaurant maintains high standards. However, the delivery experience is extremely disappointing. Orders arrive very late, and there is no proper tracking or communication during delays. What makes it worse is that there is no direct contact number for the restaurant and no toll-free customer support number for the app. In case of issues, customers are left completely helples

I noticed a pricing inconsistency while placing my order. The item was priced at ₹299 without applying any coupon, but when I applied the available offer, the final price increased to around ₹340. This creates confusion, as discounts are expected to reduce the total cost rather than increase it. It would be helpful if the pricing structure is made more transparent, ensuring that applying an offer clearly reflects actual savings. Customers rely on these discounts to make informed decisions, so a

EatClub has to be one of the worst apps I’ve used. I ordered food and ended up waiting for over an hour and the only thing the app showed was a pointless "Delayed" status. No updates, no tracking, no support — literally nothing. If you can’t deliver on time, at least have the decency to show accurate information instead of leaving customers hanging. This app is slow, unreliable, and honestly a complete waste of time. Fix your service or stop calling yourself a food delivery platform.

worst customer support!!!!! I have been a long time user and my order was delayed by 1 hour and there is no way you can connect them!! in help section there is just an AI bot and you can't do anything!! I wanted to cancel my order and get refund so called the delivery partner , and he saying even he can't do anything!! this is extremely frustrating and overwhelming!! such things are totally unacceptable!!!!!

The app discounts are a scam! Prices change on every page. And the price you see on the menu is not what you see on the checkout page whether discounted or not. Also, with the membership option, somehow everything becomes more expensive. Cart price is cheaper without membership. Overall, this is a poorly executed app and is very deceptive. Bring in transparency first.

Leaving this review for the app not the restraunt. Food is great. But you guys really need to work out the bugs in your app. I'm unable to find my past orders. When I click on "Track" it leads me to account options. So I have no way to check out my order or track them or contact the delivery person. Never really got 200 off so I'm not sure if that's even legit. Maybe it was because of 2 simultaneous orders.

Good food and reasonable prices (especially if you take their subscription). But the delivery part of their experience is always an adventure. 20 minutes can easily become 50 minutes, the delivery guy visit multiple customers in a single trip while you wait. Whatever the case, you get on time deliveries only on rare occasions. Update: another order, another delay. As expected. Order promised at 17 minutes, 40 minutes later it's still not left the restaurant.

Terrible experience with order, took 1 hour just to assign a delivery partner, and the delivery partner says it's too far and they won't deliver. They can't cancel it either. There is no support, chat, phone or otherwise, it's all chatbot, that too they don't provide an option to type a query to connect to human support. They brag about having the highest rated food delivery app on the app store, we'll see about that.

I have downgraded the app for the reason that the developer has resorted to extracting a review of food and delivery. So unless one submits a review, next order cannot be placed. The app does offer certain food items at a reduced rate between 4 -6 pm. But generally order cannot be placed for most of the items after 5. And one cannot place order even at regular price till 6 pm. Otherwise the availability of food is okay. Nothing outstanding. Stay away from the foods containing olives which smell.

The app is great, the offers are amazing. But I have been trying to order from "Mealful Rolls" for a long time now. Whenever I add the product in the cart and move to payment, they show all the rolls as "sold out". Other items like starters, desserts are available. This has happened with me more than 5 times. If the outlet can't afford so many offers, they shouldn't keep them because it seems intentional at this point.

I have been ordering food frequently from eatclub. But recently it has made do much issues. I have waited for so long for orders to be delivered, they do not assign delivery persons, nor do let us cancel the order, neither do they let us chat in the customer support nor do they pick customer support line. We can't cancel or receive food on time. It is very difficult. They don't give the restaurant number either to contact them.

Good food and delivery experience pulled down by pathetic customer service. If anything goes wrong, you're pretty much on your own. Trying to access help most times just redirects you to a chat bot and there's no way to contact anyone, particularly if your order is running late. That isn't the end of it. Recently had a wrong order delivered and they refuse to refund the full amount stating Rs. 100 credits is the maximum they can do! Moreover, they won't refund to the original payment method!

I recently placed an order with EATCLUB, choosing the option "Any 3 Boxes of Chicken." Naturally, I assumed that regardless of any additional options I selected at checkout, the chicken would remain the main component of my order. However, I chose only potatoes as a free option for each of the three boxes at the end of my order. To my astonishment, I received only potatoes in my order—no chicken at all.This kind of misleading practice does nothing but erode trust and deter future orders.

Descent offers. When you buy membership, it doesn't allow to club the existing offers or other codes. Food is descent in taste. The customisation in meal is for namesake cause i didn't get what i had selected while ordering. The app also isn't perfect and can be improved, it glitches sometimes. The tracking in app is for name sake and doesn't work as the delivery persons location can't be seen. Also the delivery is late most of the times. The customer support is also not so good.

Editing my review after using it for few months. their service has gone very bad..they keep the items which are not on the menu and then call u saying that option is not available. at one time they didn't even bother to call and i waited an hour and called customer care. Only then I came to know that the item was over. This has happened twice, and it was a bad experience. Uninstalling the app

Food quality is mediocre and often arrives cold due to late deliveries. The app will show that your order is coming within say 10 minutes, and then when you refresh it later on, it still says order coming in 10 minutes. Orders are frequently delayed. If you try to raise this issue with customer support they just put you in front of a chatbot which closes the conversations immediately. When I finally got a customer care number, it said the number is invalid. Overall, not a worthwhile experience.

The advertisement clearly stated "Get your first meal absolutely free!" This promise of a free meal is what prompted me to download the app. I went through the entire process of selecting a meal and was ready to place my order, expecting the final bill to be zero, as advertised. However, to my dismay, there was a mandatory "EatClub subscription fee" that I was required to pay. This fee was not mentioned anywhere in the initial advertisement. The final price, after this compulsory fee was added,

App is good and the prices are okay. Not too high but not too low also. The only good thing is that they waive off delivery charges. Also there should an option to change store pickup or delivery within the app, not at the start. Edit: Their free delivery is just another marketing gimmick. It never works most of the time. I was ordering at 12:40 AM and I was struck at the checkout page. After waiting for good 30 minutes I gave up and end up ordering from Zomato.

Food quality is great, but the app experience is extremely frustrating. There is no proper customer helpline, only a chatbot that gives the same generic response for every issue, which is completely useless when you actually need help. They handle delivery on their own, and the time shown in the app is highly misleading. If the app shows 30 minutes, be prepared to wait at least 1 hour to 1 hour 15 minutes to receive your order. Overall, good food but very unreliable service and a badly designed.

Terrible food service provider. I placed an order an hour and a half ago, and the app has been showing 'delivery in 9 minutes' for the past hour. The quality of Eatclub's food is below average, but we used to order from it in the IIT hostels because it would typically deliver within 30 minutes. Unfortunately, the service has gone downhill. My recent orders have all been delayed by at least an hour and a half. I strongly recommend avoiding this app.

Avoid at all costs. I'd noticed some restaurants I like using the app. So, I tried. I've ordered and have been waiting for an update for the one and a half hours. 45mins since my food was prepared and still not dispatched. Option to call restaurant manager does not connect, been trying for about half an hour. Their own customer care chat also doesn't work. What am I to do.

When I placed my order, the app showed a delivery time of 15–21 minutes, but once that time passed, it changed to “slight delay” and the delivery was delayed by nearly 65 minutes. In total, it took almost 1 hrs 26 min to receive my order. Customer service was also very poor — they put the call on hold and then disconnected after about 3 minutes without any response. This was my first time ordering, and honestly, the experience was very disappointing. I do not recommend ordering from Eat Club.

This app is beyond 3rd class, I used the app for the first time and had the worst experience. The delivery guy was unable to find the location of my house even though I stay on the main road. On top of that the customer support never gets connected and the app doesn't allow you to cancel the order at any cost, and it spills that its wastage of food, have I taken the full responsibility of "The food wastage program", they provide pathetic service. I suggest never order from them never
A great easy usefull app for gym guys .. really like that one ❤

I had high hopes for the EatClub app, but it turned out to be a major letdown. The biggest issue? Overpriced food with little to no value for money. The app claims to offer "discounts," but the final prices are often higher than ordering directly from the restaurant or other food delivery platforms. Fake Discounts – The so-called deals barely reduce the price, making it seem like a marketing gimmick Overall, EatClub is not worth it when there are better alternatives like Zomato or Swiggy.

Worst food app ever a person would ever use. You will place order and then your order will never arrive. Voila! Yeah, this is happening with me from past two months. And this too, when I have taken their eatclub premium membership. So, everytime you check 'running late order', they'll just increase the ETA and your order will never get delivered. Further, when you call their customer service, their agent put your call on hold, 10-15 minutes and then cut the call without any resolution.

Here's what I realised - when you start ordering from EatClub, they will literally send your order in 15 mins. Crazy right? As a customer retention strategy, they are prioritising your order above other orders. But as you become a regular, they'll throw your order to th back of the queue. The customer support is non existent, and you'll never be able to talk to a real person. So yeah, order maybe a couple of times but don't make this your go too, which is sad because I really like the offering.

Never order from this app.. there was a location issue in their app. so tried calling the rider, he says it's not my fault. He asked me to come and collect the order almost 1.5km away from my home. Somehow managed to connect with the manage through the app, he hung up without resolving the issue. called their call centre number. The guy on the call said he will punch a fresh order and I will receive a fresh pizza in 20 minutes. No order punched. Received a cold pizza. PATHETIC SERVICE! LIARS!

uninstalling the app now, horrible service. The delivery time shown on the app is a big scam. This is the third time it is happening to me - the delivery time shown on the screen was 30 mins, when I ordered my food, I waited for almost an hour before calling the customer care, they said it'll get delivered in another 15 mins. 20 mins later I called them again, just to know that they would not be able to deliver my order as the ingredients are out of stock...

Used to have a good experience with them usually ordering my food but recently I ordered the paneer tikka masala meal which somehow got switched up in the delivery process and what was delivered to me was some mini chicken meal. Being a vegetarian,I don't think there's a greater operational blunder that could've come from their side, completely changed my positive experience so far with their offering. The customer support was impersonal and no end point to reach out to.

To begin with there are very few options to choose from . Then the delivery takes almost an hour when it said 20 min while placing the order. On top of that the order is marked delivered even when there was no sign of it. When I tried to reach the delivery partner he didn't took the call. When I complained on the app all I got was a Sorry . There was no one to look into the matter and got my issue resolved . Finally when I got the delivery the food had got cold. I am very disappointed with this

The pricing transparency on this app is getting worse. Why am I being charged a platform fee AND a delivery fee, only to have VAT slapped on top of everything at the very end? On a small order, these extra charges almost double the price of the meal. It feels like I'm being penalized for ordering a single meal. Either include tax in the menu price or consolidate these service fees. It’s too much for a simple delivery. I am uninstalling the app. It’s much better to just go there myself & eat.

Had the worst experience ever. I ordered Popeyes through the app and had to wait 1 hour and 30 minutes without any delivery attempt. There was NO WAY to contact support from the app, and the restaurant is not picking up their phone, so I had to go to the restaurant. Restaurant could not give my food because of foodpanda rules, and they had to contact support. The support said for them not to give my food. In the end, they canceled my order and I had left inconvenienced and disappointed.

disappointment at its peak. payment processing takes so long and pays the money itself without even placing the order, and yeah, you guessed right, no refunds. it's not about money. It's about trust and humanity. i am uninstallling it, but I have the worst experience.

I don't how the service is, I Couldn't even order! When i tried to verify my phone number, it said It's already in use when i just used it once! Sometimes it doesn’t even show cash option, when with the same orders on another device shows cash method!!!!! I really didn't like the app. We haven’t had dinner cz we were tryin' it for 1 hours! Please Update your app 🙂

When it works, it's great. When it doesn't, it acts like a total scam. Order running 2 hours late? Sorry, the slow AF order help section won't give you an option to cancel. And then they have the audacity to ask you about their customer service. Sad thing is, this works very good when it does, when it doesn't, however, the whole app is designed to act as scammy as possible.

Very disappointing experience. I placed an order and paid online, but the item was not available at the shop. The rider and shop confirmed it, yet the order was wrongly marked as “customer changed mind.” Because of this, my refund was denied. Support did not properly check the issue and kept repeating the same response. Poor handling of cancellations and refunds. Not satisfied with the service.

App is showing error these days. It says order can't be placed but in actual order has been placed and amount deducted. If I repeat, it will deduct double and order will be twice. Due to application error, my order gone double and amount deducted from account. They cancelled second order but never return amount despite my complaint. Representative threatened me for future orders. It was not my fault. Huge platform fee. Scammers.

I don't feel secure for my food order it's been the third time already. with different shop KFC, pizza hut. The process is a lot when I don't get my exact order. So I just write review so people can see. I want a platform where I can guaranteed to get my items not to waste my time worry about it!!

It's a good app, but there's been a recurring problem that I have been experiencing.. the delivery riders often kept saying they don't have change. Although I understand if they just started their shift, but this has been happening way too much for it to be coincidences. every delivery rider that I encountered when I buy food kept saying the same thing and I find it odd.

I tried using the “Saver Delivery” option since it’s around ₱15–₱20 cheaper than the standard delivery. I understood that it would take a bit longer because of queued orders, and the app estimated an additional 10–20 minutes. However, the delay was way beyond that. It’s already been over an hour, and my order is still marked as “preparing,” which is really frustrating. At this point, I’m honestly expecting my order to arrive cold. Update: received it. It took 2 hours and 20 minutes.

my location is always inaccurate. The drivers would always have a hard time looking, and have to personally contact me instead. It's been 6 months since this review was posted and nothing changed. The maps are wrong and confusing. Sometimes I'd have to wait longer for my food +drivers get lost and have to look around even longer. Please fix this.

When you click on the restaurant under "Order Again", it actually does NOT give you the same restaurant and it could be an entirely different branch. No warning or indication. So if you do not double check the restaurant information (which defeats the purpose of the "Order again" shortcut, you will be wasting your money without recourse. And the help/customer service is non-existent.

extremely bad experience. I ordered through them paid in advance, it was a 3k order. restaurant canceled the order and I didn't get refund. when I went in live chat and asked for the refund they told me they cannot do anything call the restaurant. when I called the restaurant they told me you haveade payment to foodpanda only they can refund you . such a bad experience with them . this has not happened for the first time with me. but definitely the last time.

The multiple stops for drivers are out of hand. When I ordered the 'standard delivery' it said it would take around 20-35 minutes. Now, the driver is taking 3 extra stops (for the 'standard delivery') and it is taking 40-50 minutes. This isn't even the cheapest delivery option. Ridiculous. When trying to contact customer support, I found there is no way to make an actual complaint or support request on an active delivery. Again, ridiculous. Using Grab from now on.

Trust me on this, just dont use foodpanda to order anything from shops like family mart, the combination of scummy behaviour from the chop and the service from foodpanda will just scam your money away. They will cancel 80% of the products you bought, and still deliver you the last 1 or 2 items which is not the main reason you ordered. And prevent you from cancelling to order. Also they will change the product from what you ordered, and when requested for refund, they will make it impossible to.

I ordered from Foodpanda for the first time, and unfortunately, my experience was very disappointing. The delivery was delayed by about an hour, and my order was incomplete—one item was missing. Additionally, I did not receive any proper assistance or resolution regarding the issue. Overall, it was a very unsatisfactory experience.

Bad customer support. There was a problem with online payment within the app, yet the payment was still deducted from my bank account. I asked if it can be refunded but the agent keep pushing no payment was made. I have provided them with evidence that it was deducted yet they keep repeating the same statement. Ultimately, the agent ended the chat without resolution. Do not put your card info. Always do cash on delivery if you want to use the app

I had a very disappointing experience with Foodpanda. I placed my order at 6:30 PM, and the app clearly stated a delivery time of 30–60 minutes. The rider picked up my food around 6:40 PM, but instead of delivering it directly, he went to another location to handle a different order, which caused an additional delay of 30–40 minutes. It’s now 8:40 PM and I still haven’t received my food. This kind of delay is unacceptable.

Service recently had been very bad recently. Drivers are assigned multiple orders, and if a driver had an emergency, there is no way to cancel an order. I had an order that was delivered 1 hour after it was picked up, when it should have been 10 minutes, and another order that arrived 30 minutes after pickup when it should have been about 5 minutes.

Very bad experience. My order was cancelled saying “unable to find customer”, but the payment of BDT 297.38 was still deducted from my card. Support team was not helpful and kept redirecting instead of solving the refund issue. I still haven’t received my refund. This is not acceptable. Refund process should be clear and fast. Very disappointed with the service.

Been with the app for over 3 years now, even subscribed for premium. However, for the first time, it's now asking me to submit a copy of valid national ID for an order of beer, which it didn't require before. I contacted their helpline to verify whether it's really foodpanda that's asking for the IDs, however, the agent on the other end couldn't give a definite answer. What gives?

There should be an option to cancel an order if the merchant and rider is super delayed. Delays are unacceptable and customers are helpless as they don't have option to cancel. It's been more than an hour and the status is still preparing. I never experienced this with grab. This will be my last time using food panda.

The app is not bad but the service is extremely bad. 30% time the food delivery delays and the delay is not 10-20 mins- they are 60-90 minutes additional delays. If you can't get food in 40-60 minutes after ordering then what's the point!? New review: Today i ordered food, paid in advance and after 25 mins the app showed that the food is picked. For 2 hours it was showing that the food is on the way. When i wanted an explanation in support chat they just said "sorry"+90৳ vchr. Get them banned.
Nice app but the thing I want or maybe my friends too are all in pro(subscription)

you need to fix the countdown for the window that you're allowed to modify the order. During the countdown, if you swap to another app, it FREEZES the countdown. this is ridiculous and makes zero sense. we expect the order to be placed once the countdown goes down. not for it to FREEZE.

I subscribed to panadpro, but of no use, first duplicate order was placed due to app glitch then when i canceled they canceled on non refundable terms on their own. And they didn't gave me back either my groceries and my money. And it also doesn't allow an option to have discussion on call to a representative.

Uninstalling this app, i hope their's a refund button if your order has been delayed for more than an hour. Ordered at noontime around 12:15 and order is to be expected within 30mins-45mins, its 1:40pm already and they are still telling me to wait for my order. This is unacceptable, frustrating and inconvenient

I'm just fed up with stupid things. i wanna give feedback, but there is no option for that. There is no option for remarks to resturant. There is contact info of restaurant in case you wanna add things, if you order two or three thing, and if they are out of stock no one contact you. no cancel option, they will deliver what is ready. need to improve guys

Normal delivery and saver delivery is not much different. 45mins for a non-saver delivery is already pretty generous considering that the place is not even 20mins away. I ended up getting deliveries beyond an hour despite not even opting for savers. The app also conveniently doesn't allow customers to complain to the support since "running a bit late but the food is already on the way to you". I can ignore one or two ridiculously late deliveries but it is getting consistently late these days.

Pro subscription doesn't really benefit pro users anymore. It used to be $15 minimum for free delivery, now most shops have gone up to $25 minimum. So I'm forced to pay for more food or pay very high delivery fees. Apparently the platform fee can also go up to $1.10 nowadays. I've been using Grabfood nowadays and it seems like the better option for now, much more food options too.

Worst app and service ever. Drivers are untrained, unhelpful, and no consideration. Services are complicated, roundabout, glitchy, sensitive, hidden, and broken. Help center is the most unhelpful thing to have ever existed. Help center chat cannot handle one second in the background, closes as soon as I try to check a message, which means the chat is lost and the issue is unresolved and unfinished, abandoned and they have no incentive to contact again. Want to say more, but can't. Word limit.

I've been constantly using this since Covid. Recently, the "Select payment method" button keeps appearing although it has been selected. Even when I managed to get past that issue, the button turned into "Place order" upon clicking which doesn't do anything. NOWADAYS I CANNOT PLACE ORDERS ANYMORE even after I stopped the App and cleared cache. (Yes my credit card on the payment method is still valid and perfectly fine.)

I've lodged 3 complaints in the last week through foodpanda email but there is no proper complaint channel. In the last week only, thrice I payed for priority delivery and waited for an hour for the order that was supposed to be delivered within 15-20 minutes. it showed the roads were blocked, that is why they are charging extra and that there was delay, while in realty the restaurant was only 10 minutes away and the roads were not blocked at all.

This is extremely disappointing. The restaurant has confirmed that the order has been ready for the past 20 minutes, but no rider has arrived to pick it up. What kind of service is this? Using Foodpanda has turned into a terrible experience — no proper support, no delivery, and no option to cancel. Highly unprofessional and unacceptable. very very Bad service

I waited more than an hour only for them to cancel last minute, multiple times, with multiple stores. Today I used the order for later feature, I ordered my food around 2pm, expecting it to arrive around 6 or 7 pm, only for foodpanda to cancel last minute. What was the point of ordering it early if they wont tell the unavailability earlier? Now its late and near open fasting time already.

Multiple stops has gotten worse over time. Delivery 1 was just 1 street away from my location but the driver had to deliver someplace 2.5 kms away for delivery 2 which I think got cancelled, I'm not sure... then go back to my place (delivery 3) which took an hour. This has happened 4x already so I can't recommend this service anymore. I've used this app for 4 years now with panda pro subscription but I'm uninstalling now. Hopefully others have a better experience. Thanks for the 4 years.

Foodpanda is a fantastic food delivery app with a wide selection of restaurants. The interface is easy to use, making ordering quick and hassle‑free. Delivery times are generally fast and reliable. Promotions and discounts make it affordable for frequent use. Foodpanda is perfect for satisfying cravings at home or the office.

Food was delivered late for a couple of times such to a point where I collected the food myself even though I paid for the food to be delivered. In the foodpanda app it shows the restaurant is preparing the food but the food were already prepared but their rider have not come to collect the food yet. So the food was left untouch until it was already cold.

I want to bring to your attention that the service of the Foodpanda app has become very poor. Orders are often delayed, and sometimes the delivery experience is not satisfactory. Another major issue is that there is no clear or easy complaint option available in the app. Customers should have a proper way to submit complaints and get timely responses to their problems. I request you to please improve your service quality and add a proper complaint option so customers can report issues easily a

The app is well designed and easy to use. However, as a useful feedback, it would be extremely useful for the restaurants/warungs, etc. to update/show the weight of each products they sell in grams/kilogram, it would be extremely useful when ordering. Too many times, the photos of the products sold from different restaurants/warungs are way bigger than the actual product. would be useful to know the weight of the product before ordering.

Delivery from a shop 5min away took 1.5hrs before any rider picked up the order. No way of contacting support or cancelling order during this time. Meanwhile, rider made multiple stops after picking up my order so still take another 30minutes to arrive. No priority on late orders? Or all orders are late so doesn't even matter? Severely disappointed with foodpanda service and app. Order took total of 2hrs and cost way more than if I had just gone myself. Recommend using grab or shopee over this.

The worst feature of this app is users does not have an option to opt-out when rider takes multiple orders. Imagine ordering an ice cream and the rider will make 3 stops. You are the last and your ice cream became soup. Some users don't care how much they will pay on delivery fee as long as their food arrive fast.

So hard to contact support now, it used to be the selling point of the app compared to other delivery services-that contacting support was easy. Now the app just loops you to endless and useless FAQs. Also, why can the restarurant remove items from ym cart without my permission, to the point it left less than half of the items I needed.

very bad user experience, if order is delayed you don't have any way to contact customer support, after a specific time has passed, if you try you just see a message that sorry for the delay in order, and if after waiting for an hour your chat is started, you don't get a good response they just say the same sorry for the delay and then disappear, if you minimize the chat you can't return to that chat, such a bad user experience of an app that is being used on such a big scale. very disappointed.

Would have given it -5, Google maps is better, way better way cheaper way more restaurants. On top of it I ordered something on the side, lays for the delivery guy to literally just pick but they charge a whopping 216 more cause they want me to order more cause it's hard to just stop so I order 12 eggs. But when I confirm it apparently there were hidden delivery charges 170 more!! Like wth is this. No shame. Like could they not just choose a mall that is on the way?????? Google maps is better

Update: Been a loyal customer for over 5 years, but today I waited 2 hrs for an order that never arrived for it only to be cancelled. Very disappointed and this will be my last order with foodpanda Modifying orders IS NOT POSSIBLE even when they have a feature for it. There should be a grace period for customers to make changes (specially if they intent to add more items) Ive also encountered missing items more that.

I was charged twice for my order, & when I reached out to CS, the agent was completely unhelpful. They kept saying sorry but ultimately said they couldn’t issue a refund due to “system limitations,” which is unacceptable. This kind of response shows a lack of accountability & proper customer care. Being double-charged is already frustrating, but what makes it worse is that there’s no real effort to resolve the issue. It feels like customers are left to deal with the consequences of their error

A store messed up my order, but customer support was very fast and handled the issue well. They provided a good and fair solution quickly, which I really appreciate. The UI is also easy to navigate, making the overall experience smooth. Despite the initial mistake, the resolution made the experience positive.

Absolute joke of an app with the worst customer support navigation system. Where is the option to cancel my order when its been on perpetual Delay status for over an hour? Why are customers still allowed to place an order for a merchant past their closing hours, and then not having the option to Cancel Our Orders??? Whoever is the product managers or stakeholders of the app are seriously out of touch with what they think works best for their clown app.

Very bad experience two times In a row. They kept delaying my order for more than 2 hours last time and there is no way to contact support. Anyone who orders food is certainly hungry and busy otherwise we can cook our own food. . Not going to receive my order as I made burger at home update after few months more bad experience they take a lot of fee but no real solution for bad experience. I am a pro member but thinking about cancelling the subscription

Tried to use this to order food in Laos, but ordering was completely blocked for me as my UK SIM isn't working to receive an SMS and the app insisted on verifying my phone number even though I logged in with my Google account. Also no option to verify via WhatsApp or wechat, which could have been good alternatives. Extra annoying as it let me build a basket and add a credit card, which took ages, before I got stuck.

I submitted my passport documents for account verification. but unfortunately, it shows that the verification was unsuccessful. I contacted support team, but no solution. I believe this feature should be available for all customers. Grab should provide equal opportunities to everyone.. I don't know how they closed our enquiry and make it as resolved without our confirmation. I also ask e invoice but garb doesn't generate for my trips.

Grab sucks. The app sucks. I made 2 orders, the restaurants didn't accept them, but I have to wait for the system to cancel them. Once I waited 1.5 hours!!! Make a chat with the restaurant or your agent to quickly resolve these issues, instead of waiting until it becomes known after 1.5-2 hours that the restaurant is long closed. The support sucks. The same problem with taxi.

Terrible support system. It is for order/payment made through it. But if you are the receiver and not the booker, then you have no way of getting support directly from Grab. A booker ordered grab to send me their product, and the Grab driver sent to the wrong house. There is no way for me to contact the driver or Grab to get this rectified immediately, only booker can, and this isn't their fault. Also app archive message too fast before I can reply.

This app is frustrating to use and not very user intuitive. After you have ordered a car, it is impossible to zoom in on your pick up location to check your own location in reference to it. There are an annoying amount of notifications. Using it because I'm overseas and this is one of the most used ride share apps where I am.
Amazing app, so helpful for my workouts 💪 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

This is the worst app that I use. Recently it has stepped up its spam game and opens fullscreen "flash deal" ads all the time. And they make them really hard to close. I'm already giving you money all the time! Please, stop spamming me too! update: Today it messed up my order again! If you ever give it location permission access and forget to remove it, it will just send your food wherever it wants instead of sending it to the exact same place I send it every time.

I place 2 scheduled grabmart orders, but the product is out of stock from both of the orders. I can't cancel, the store is confused because they can't cancel it too, so in the end the driver cancels it. the problem doesn't end there, because it's a scheduled order, it keeps searching for another driver to pick up (remember the store can't cancel it). I feel really bad for those drivers :(. and why help center only using AI, where is the human? I need to talk to humans not an AI for this problem.

can't pin location. Wrong location. Drop and pick up mess up. can't find my place at all. If I pin my location, It'll show different place and It's far from my place. Updated: The apps work great for me now. I mostly use it while I'm in hospital. It's just that some place fees are so expensive. The food is not too expensive but including the fees, it can be expensive. For the ride, i have almost no complaints except for something it took a long time just to find the drivers.

Current experience with this app is very traumatizing, why did the app changed the placed when I specifically clicked the first place but then when the booked finally confirm, it changed to the 2nd option, just why?! It automatically changed the address where the package was suppose to go. I was blamed for clicking the wrong address where the item should be placed, I couldn't cancel it anymore because it already booked the driver. Thank goodness the driver was nice and understanding

Accidentally hit "Pick-up" and couldn't change it to delivery or cancel. The app assigned a branch 1 hour away instead of the nearby one. It's ridiculous to expect a customer to drive that far for a mistake that could be easily fixed with a "Change to Delivery" button.The order was processed so rapidly that I had no time to react, leaving me stuck with an order an hour away. Fix your system!

Worst APP forever if you have any unsatisfying you can't reprot you can call you can only send emails to them, and there is a lot of time I order food been waiting over 1 hour and shop just cancel my order without any sorry, I book the car pick up on time and the driver was late like 30mins and ge didnt show up, and I just cancel it, later grab doesn't give me back my money, because is advance booking???? so why your driver can't come on time? and you charge my money because of your fault??????

i've been using grab since 2018. So far, i've been satisfied with their ride services. Not to mention that innovative features like grab mart and food was a good services offered by them. But, recently, i'm experiencing unfavorable moment using grabfood. Where my food order keep being switch without any notification from the merchant or the grab itself. And the most critical part, when my orders have missing items and reports made was left silent for days without no action. Please do something.

There is no cancelling your order, ever. It says if restaurant is already preparing your order, you cannot cancel, which is reasonable. But when the restaurant only saw your order, didn't start to make it, the driver is nowhere to be found, well you can't cancle either. There is no further explanation and you can't reach customer service. But then you decide to wait for your order and accept no cancellation rule, then after 30 minutes, the restaurant cancels it. What a great ride this has been.

Good experience. Just that, in certain area, Grab drivers refused to go to the designated pick up points by the authorities, they might have their own preferred pick up points, which are only known to the local, but new arrivals don't know it. Besides this, I also wish to suggest for Grab food, the app can show/ allow filter with restaurants which use environmental friendly packaging, this is my main consideration in my choice of ordering.

Amazing app with new issues every week! Not satisfied with double charge? They got you covered with Triple charge, holding twice the amount of what you paid for more than a week! Cancelled your booking because there's no rider? You'll be surprised when a grab rider calls you after arriving at destination using other app (will charge you a cancellation fee, which you can waive so don't forget to). Support? AI will make sure you'll have hard time getting one. Just no. What happened to this company

CS was unhelpful! I was stuck in my premium wallet verification for almost 3 days now, because of a generic error when trying to take the selfie. All tickets raised were being tagged as resolved without communication of solution nor updates, and even though the issue persists, I have been a customer for years! This is really unfortunate.

Suggestion for improvement. There needs to be an option for changing the pickup location or add a drop off point during a trip. We had an issue where the driver would not cancel the trip as he went to the wrong pickup location and the trip started. He then drove around for 20 minutes lost as to where we actually were. We had no way to cancel the trip other than change the drop off location to a location near to the driver.

Two hours... TWO HOURS FOR MY SANDWICH TO BE DELIVERED AND IT'S STILL GETTING DELAYED. I feel like this app lacks drivers, and has an extremely weird transaction process where they'd hold your order before passing it down to the restaurant intentionally that takes ages for them to do it. The GPS tracker is garbage for both sides, where the GPS fails miserably at telling you where the driver is, and it also fails at giving the drivers the correct route. My sammy still hasn't arrived. Never again.

The app is nice to use once in a while if youre in a hurry but I do hope that you add a way for us to see the breakdown of fees after the grab taxi ride. not being able to tell how much the driver charged us makes it hard for us to report if they overcharged. I've been overcharged for more than 5 times already because of this and I can't report it.

This app is the one of the most effective apps in order for you to track your progress in your workouts, But please add more workouts for it and it would be nice if your premium plan stays on that pricelist. 😎

Placed an order for food, tried to cancel immediately after, no cancel option as the kitchen was 'preparing' my order... That took 60 mins. Greedy, awful, money mad business - zero customer support. Signed up for the upgraded package - you get discounted delivery but they just put delivery fees up so in the end, doesn't really feel like a discount.

2 minutes is way too aggressive before penalizing the riders, especially when the driver themselves either flag themselves as arrived before actually being there, or when they stop in the wrong place! Another to give this app a 1*, I pre-schedule a ride, driver cancels on me 5 minutes before the scheduled pick-up time, and I get charged a no-show fee! I then have to pay the fee before I can book another car.

so I got the wrong items that I ordered from grab mart, nothing that I actually ordered came. And when I was asking for a refund, they took so long to respond and eventually a week after, they said that my issue is resolved, sending a blank text on the help page. So i conplained again and they said, "The booking is completed" and they cant issue a refund. Like what? I didnt receive anything that I need and they just decided that it's okay. They can't help you when problems will come.

I have tried several ways to pinpoint my exact location but there is something wrong with the map location. It is very inconvenient in a way that the drivers asked for more charge even if we provided a note regarding the address because we cannot get the exact location. Because of this, I am thinking of switching to other app for more convenience.

The features are good, but the pricing is ridiculous. The taxi price can double or triple within 10 minutes. The app has enormous amount of benefits and "offers" but they are useless or straight away blocked on checkout... The "Pass" subscription promises a lot, but in practice - doesn't worth that. Marketing department! This 1* is for you!

I was charged more than the actual amount of the food. I paid ₱228.86 for just one order of chicken fingers, which does not match the proper price. I already provided proof of the charge, but Grab Support only gave me a generic response and did not properly resolve the issue. Very disappointing customer support and billing experience.

My order was incorrect and incomplete. I did file a dispute and I will get a refund for the same amount, but the food that is missing is not for me but for another person, so that person will have nothing to eat because of the missing items, and I will have to order again and got charged again for another delivery, which is unfair. This is my first time ordering food via grab, and this happened. I will go back to foodpanda instead.

the ad they made when u order a vehicle is so u can't cancel on time.. I find this cheating and very on purpose! I'm trying to save money but now that I already chose an option and driver already accept I can't cancel or else the driver review for the day would be ruined!! fix this issue and be more honest grab! don't be too greedy!

The ordering and delivery experience is nice. I encountered a serious bug where even after being picked up and completing my trip, the app still showed “Finding a ride.” This causes confusion and may lead to incorrect charges or disputes. In fact, on a previous trip, I was charged a cancellation fee because of this same issue. This is unfair to both passengers and drivers. I have never received any of the "credits" I was due on orders I paid for where there were missing items or completely wrong items. They also apparently keep zero records of credits applied on previously orders. Probably because they don't exist. Going back to DoorDash at least they provide credits immediately when there is a problem.

Nothing but errors each time I to select a something I have not ordered before. Mostly because I COULDN'T order them before. Same errors, same items and has NEVER BEEN FIXED. Doesn't matter if it is pick up or delivery. Happened even when I had account through Prime. This company cannot seem to be bothered to fix the issues and there is no way to report the problems. They just want money and who cares what the customer wants. No fees is bs, too. Just use doordash.

The app is a headache to navigate, you can't search for what you want without having to sort through a bunch of overpriced garbage. But the worst part is just how pathetic the deals offered are. Useless "deals" like "save $3 when you spend $50" that you may as well not bother with. Not worth the space it takes up in your phone, let alone a subscription

Not very dependable. Orders are often delayed, then delayed again. Drivers get assigned to the order then ditch it. I've used the app a few times because it's free with Prime. I definitely wouldn't recommend that anyone pay for a subscription. Any of the other options would be a better bet. You could literally go to the store, buy ingredients, come home & cook and still be waiting for a grubhub driver to actually arrive at the restaurant to pick up an order. 🤨

I don't understand how this app is supposed to help students get food who can't make it to campus or somewhere else yet everytime u try to use ur bearkat one card to pay, it hardly goes through. For freebirds, the transaction NEVER goes through. it goes through with the other places, but ofc, it doesn't go through with freebirds at all. I've tried multiple times.

This used to be the best food ordering app out there. Now it's dropped off the map due to no updates or fixes. I created a family order on my laptop. Went to the app to order and nothing was there. Not even my current addresses. What a waste of time. Went to Uber Eats. Your order build stays when you go from website to app. No more wasted time and plenty of options! Fix your system. I should be able to see my order across platforms. And have full access to my addresses and to edit at will.

I think this app is great and very convenient. However, I have a few grievances. When a place cancels an order, they are not able to send a reason why. I also think there should be some preventative measures in order to avoid ordering when there is a shortage on something. For example, restaurants should be able to provide notices such as "out of rice" in a red section when you click the restaurant's page. Restaurants canceling my order has made my planning extremely difficult.

I'm a Doordash loyalist. My company gave me a gift card for Grubhub. It is the most astonishingly bad app I've used in awhile. The restaurant inventory doesn't update dynamically, so you add stuff to your cart that can't be added, and then you get an "unknown" error. I still have yet to use my gift card because of how difficult it is to place an order. That's how bad this app is - I won't even use it to get free food.

The App itself is the issue. I keep trying to give them the benefit of the doubt but after talking to the last two drivers they confirmed the app has given them wrong addresses to restaurants or they don't get notifications. So my last few deliveries were delayed over an hour and one of them 2hrs and they don't allow you to cancel because the restaurant has already made the food. They offer a $5-$10 credit.

when the app worked, my order was frequently incorrect. last week, my order was placed at 11AM and didn't arrive until around 1PM (the store was only 15 mins away). This week, I placed an order that didn't even arrive. When I tried to get help in the app, the chat would result in an "error" and wouldn't load. I recommend using a different app that actually has drivers.

On almost every single order, my driver cancels at the last minute and they have to find a new one which pushes my order out by 45 minutes minimum. I had one coffee take 2 hours to deliver and they wouldn't give me a refund. I tip 20% every time too and more if it's a small order. GH is the WORST of the apps and they're all horrible.

Several of the restaurants I've ordered from using other apps in the past are not available on GH. Hopefully they address this issue so I don't have to return to those apps. Other than that it's a good app to use for convenience if you're unable to pick up your orders and also to get your order submitted so you can just pick it up quick and easy.

It is confusing to see how much we own without the tip being preset. I wanted to make my own calculations to tip, and I could not. why don't just show the total before any tips so if person wants to use custom they can quick calculate. after clicking on a option, there is no way to remove the tipping. again, the custom then becomes useless because I can't see how much the order is without any tips.

I placed my first order and it got delayed twice because they didn't have a driver to deliver it so I tried to cancel my order because it would've been cold by the time it got to me but they wouldn't cancel it. I had to contact customer service and they still wouldn't cancel and kept trying to offer me a $5 credit. finally after insisting that they refund my money multiple times and 20 minutes later they cancelled my order but it's gonna take 2 days to get my money back. I will never order again

Terrible experience in the last delivery. It seems like the app was wrongly configured for smash up burger in aachen. We ordered black truffle but something else was sent. Wolt was not helpful at all with the problem. Terrible customer service from wolt.

Usually, I have always given GrubHub high ratings. But today...not good. For 2 days in a row, I placed an order, paid for it as usual and waited for our food to be delivered. I continued to wait 2+ hours on the first day and they offered me a $5 credit (only) towards my next order...I accepted and thought the problem would be corrected...nope. Today, same thing happened again. This time, they tried to haggle credit offers of $5, $7 & $10...then back to $5! Unacceptable.

Terrible service. Order was delayed two times, and it still arrived late. No communication as to why it was so delayed. Customer service offers you $5 and after multiple calls they offer you an additional $10. Won't use the credited money on my account, do not rely on the food to show up on time and nothing will be done about it.

No one checks the orders. GrubHub will refund you money for missing items but the whole point of ordering means we want the items that are missing. We don't want our money back we want the items we ordered. How do y'all make your driver's check? How do you make sure that your orders are correct when the drivers deliver them? You aren't. You'll refund a part of the order because it's missing but there is no quality control or assurance to make sure that the actual order is complete and correct.

continuous issue: the app shows a particular restaurant has a particular delivery time, then when you place your order the delivery time changes (increases). then inevitably it is delayed while you're waiting. so when you choose a restaurant that shows a 21 minute delivery time, it changes to 30-45 minutes when you place your order, then gets delayed to over an hour while you're waiting for it. don't bother contacting customer service, they take no action.

almost never use this garbage anymore, usually have to wait an hour or more cause they don't have any drivers (go figure no one wants to work for them lol) the deals they list don't always work and the second you start looking on the app they start sending emails telling you to order something. also the prices get jacked up as well cause they always have promotions for free delivery and service so they gotta make money somewhere

I was given a credit for food not delivered in the app. App auto includes credit in order but it won't let me submit the order. I keep getting an error message saying it can't use 2 types of payments on single order. I go to AI help. No help. Get transferred to Chandra who's help is more like another AI bot pretending to be a person...still no resolution. Wait a few hours, try help again and can't even get the AI bot to pop up. 20 minutes and nothing. I am now out $53.84 and the app is useless

delivery fees are high. but I guess you pay for not having to go in. and they don't have outrageous markups on food items like Door dash. I wish you could change store locations though, there are many that are from stores Very far away where there are closer stores of the same company. might as well just drive there myself and get the food.

Absolutely horrible customer service! Tried to cancel an order but was unable to because "they already started preparing it".
