The number the app provides was not working when I tried to call and cancel it myself and I was told there was nothing else they could do. So now I have no food, and am out $40.

Absolutely inconsistent with military base deliveries, when the order instructions state "requires base access" drivers tend to ignore it and fail to deliver when they inevitably reach the gate. When you request a refund, customer service states "Next time, have more detailed instructions." and refuse to issue a refund.

DANGER: This app wrongly lists restaurants as available for pick up when they're not. Drove out to the establishment adjacent to a hotel, and no one there knew anything about Grubhub! Wasted 90 minutes of driving, trying to track down the manager, and haggling with Grubhub's support team. Sad! Will be using Doordash from now on. Checked a day later and they still haven't corrected the mistaken listing.

Today I placed an order that was never delivered for around $75 and I had to argue for more than an hour to get a refund. They wanted to just give me a $10 discount when I received nothing. Their help is extremely difficult to reach and almost impossible to get assistance from. I am disabled and can't get my own food a lot but this should be a much better experience than what they give.

Remember how great Foodler was? Grubhub is nothing like that. And the app is purposely annoying. You literally cannot turn off ad notifications if you also want delivery alerts. They purposely do not separate them. How scummy is that? And the fees are outrageous. But don't worry, if you spend $50 you get no fees as long as you're subscribed to the service! How GENEROUS!

My main issue with the app itself is there is no way to keep track of which restaurants are good experiences, and which ones are bad. I've had so many poor experiences - incorrect orders, and quality/taste of food. If there was a way to keep some notes about my experiences so that I remember before ordering from the same place again, and having another poor experience, it would really help with the whole GrubHub experience. Very close to deleting the app.

My first time trying to use the app and my delivery kept getting pushed back and pushed back. Now (if delivered at the new current time) it will be two hours from ordering to delivery. I cannot cancel because and I tried going through Help within the app and their AI bot says there's nothing they can do? I don't even expect a complete refund, but just something to make this feel a little better. I've never experienced anything like this with years of using other delivery services. Unacceptable.

Food arrives hours after ordering, almost always cold and missing things from orders. That's assuming they don't cancel the order entirely, without your input. On top of that, all food ordered is not only far more expensive than if you went to these places yourself, even with membership, but they also don't reflect all of the options each place has. Wouldn't recommend these days.

the prices are actually INSANE. it would cost me $30 for something that was originally $14. everyone please save your money and just go pickup your food yourself. if the "fees" weren't added on i would consider keeping the app, but honestly it seems like such a selfish company I'm deleting it. I was ordering about once a week, but not anymore!

I've had Grubhub+ for a few years. It was great until they partnered with Instacart last year. Now groceries take about 6 hours to be delivered. They give you a reasonably time initially, and gradually start shifting it. Last time, my stuff was meant to be delivered at 5, which changed to 6, then 7. I called them at 8 and they said they'd have to cancel. This wasn't an isolated incident. Now delivery is free if you order 50+, but they've added ridiculous service and deliv fees on smaller orders.

Yeah so I'll never order from GrubHub again, had 2 drivers canceled on my last order then it finally arrived almost 2 hours later. Food was cold of course so I issued a refund on the 30 dollar order I made but was only offered 5 dollars back in credits then when I wrote the AI chat agent that 5 in credits is not nearly enough for a refund and then they "issued 15 credits but the app only shows 10 credits and I can't use them and don't know which store I can use them on. Back to doordash I go

the search function is hot garbage, if you look a dish up it's not on the menu of restaurants that it provides, half the places with vegan offerings in my area don't show up because it's a tag and half the places that are listed as vegan don't have a single thing that is vegan it baffles me how bad this app can get in response to the response it's not that the options don't exist in truth I would prefer less options, the issue is that the app is coded in such a way so as to push bad options

terrible service. I live in one of the most densely populated areas of the country, and other delivery services are just fine. but GH somehow manages to deliver food that is cold, soggy, and late (35 min delivery times turn into 80+ min delivery times). just absurd how bad they are at doing the one thing they're supposed to do... deliver food.

I am so mad with GrubHub right now. I only use it because of the Amazon Prime deal, but I won't be using it anymore. Last order, the driver did not follow delivery instructions on how to deliver it to my place of work so I had to waste my lunch period spending 10 of my precious 30 minutes hunting it down. This time the order had shown that the driver was almost there and the order was cancelled! A refund is not enough compensation for this. I went without lunch because of this!

this was my very first time ever using these delivery apps so i was like why not now. i order my food. not only was it late and gave me the run around but i was sent pictures of not my food that also looked kinda creepy. it said it was delivered but i never got it. needless to say it seems grub hub doesnt vet there drivers but if you like only receiving app credit and no food. be my guest.

I have gone almost the whole day trying to solve a technical issue. I started with addressing my issue. I try to troubleshoot the problem myself. I even included the link to the Amazon and Grubhub troubleshoot website. I have tried numerous times but had no success. Grubhub responded back with me doing the steps? Not just once, but like 4-5x. Are they even reading the emails completely? Maybe, with this review, I could get like a senior employee to solve my problem. CARESUPPORT@GRUBHUB No Good.

extreme issues with constant massive amounts of time taken, many orders get canceled but only after the store closes because they take so long in the first place. worst part is support for some reason refuses to believe their service is the problem. trying out uber eats instead and cancelling my sub asap

Ordering and customizing your order is very user friendly and the app has smoothe screen transitions (isn't slow, laggy or glitchy) which is completely opposite and 100% better than the other popular food delivery app that starts with the letter "U" and rhymes with goober (which is such a nostalgic '90's food product btw hahaha!) BUT GH price, service and delivery fees are ridiculously high, in my opinion. Then again, I am unemployed and only have plasma donation cash flow so every penny counts.

The last straw with this terrible app after every single delivery had something wrong- app wouldn't take my new address, attempted to deliver it somewhere else then the driver refused to go one more mile to deliver. Horrible customer service where no one is empowered to do anything, I deleted my account. There are too many delivery services to deal with this awful company. Enjoying DoorDash with no problems.

The map interface of this app is really bad. it keeps defaulting to the last restaurant I went to when looking for a chain. it's so hard to change it takes more time to order on this app than to order in person. The app map should automatically detect where I am and find the closest match to where I am instead of defaulting to a previous restaurant I went to.

Great for when we didn't go grocery shopping or feel too tired to cook. and with prime membership it's discounted, too. It depends on the drivers, the restaurant, many factors as to whether everything goes well enough to say 5 stars. In general, I rarely have issues, though 😁. And it gives many people the ability to earn extra money.

I would give this zero if i could. Always have an issue with the drivers and food is always terrible by time it arrive 2 or 3 hours after ordering and support is constantly trying to save the company money instead of helping the customer. We had the plus member ship and it wasn't worth anything. Waste of time and money for terrible service all round.

I always choose refund for every item and SHOPPER ALWAYS SAYS THEY DIDN'T KNOW so they ask if I want a substitute for every out of stock item. And then they make it worse by calling me! Last time they even canceled my order because I didn't see in time but I SHOULDN'T NEED TO SAY ANYTHING ELSE. PLEASE FIX THIS FRUSTRATING ONGOING ISSUE. This has been happening for years. Also there should be a NO SUBSTITUTES FOR ALL option. Manually selecting for each item is a huge inconvenience.

I have to say, I wish I had done this sooner, the subscription pays for itself immediately..., first order with it I saved more than the subscription cost, plus it's 30 days free trial. You don't have to have a subscription, but I promise you the deals are better, the costs are lower, and the benefits are exceptional. Lots of stores and restaurants to order from, exclusive bundle deals as well. A+ ☆☆☆☆☆
no support for international phone numbers or cards. very frustrating experience

Super expensive additional fees. Why isn't there an option under your orders to rate your driver? For instance, once the delivery is completed and I open the app, it will pop up a "rate the driver" whatever window, and if I misclick out of it, I cannot get back to or retrieve that pop up again. it shouldn't be that hard. The dashers deserve better since their scores affect the orders they get.

Posting this issue here because nothing ever gets done about it. I had multiple door dashers having issues with finding my unit, despite the clear instructions on the address. One recently dropped my order off at the wrong unit. Each report only replies with "The type of issue submitted doesn't qualify for a refund or credit. However, we're always working to improve your experience and will note this feedback." Then the process only repeats. Food is always late.

Not great and still the best. Price gouges like all the other food delivery apps: service fee + delivery fee + inflated prices. I wish they were more honest about it, still better than menu log and uber. One thing I would like to see is a list of ingredients for people with intolerances, and the ability to restrict what is offered based on that. No point showing me foods that I can't order because they'll make me sick. I'm more likely to try something new and order more if I know it's safe.

Support can do nothing to help you if you do run into an issue other than give 5 dollar credits. So while the app is generally decent, if a big does mess up your order you basically have no recourse. In my case, it was forcibly switching a pick up order to delivery (where delivery would be almost 2 hours as no one is in my area). Once it went through, there was no recourse to do anything and couldn't cancel unless I wanted to eat 99% of the cost

DoorDash lost a customer today. I've been with the app for years and spent Thousands (saved over $8k in fees with dashpass) but I can't continue to use them for the simple fact that a horrible McDonald's opened closer to my location, the worst rated one in the state and they won't let me choose the better one just down the road, but UberEats will, UE also has better UI, it's cheaper, they have discount codes all the time, you can upload drop off pictures and they have more menu options.

Terrible food delivery app. They never offer full refunds for issues with the food (unlike Uber Eats), their customer service is non-existent and it's impossible to get in contact with them, and there is nothing letting you know whether your dasher is on a bicycle or in a car, so sometimes good deliveries take a very long time with no obvious explanation. The only reason I'm even using this app is because of the free dash pass promo with Amazon, but believe me, soon as it's over I'm uninstalling

Deceptive with hidden fees; delivery fee is displayed, but they also hide a "service fee" under the "taxes" section (just to clarify; it's not a tax), which can vary in cost. "Deals" price threshold also creep up overtime, which is a bit reminiscent of price fixing. Dash Pass advertises it removes delivery fees, but then like half the options have a fee anyways (and there is always a varying service fee). They also skim drivers tips.

Not sure if it's a glitch with a recent update, but for some reason I'm not getting notifications if the dasher messages me (and yes all alerts/notifications are set to "on" so I should get both a text and an app alert). I have to manually open the order and check the order details to see if I have a message. I use the app mainly for groceries and this makes it very difficult when something is out of stock or the dasher needs my attention in a timely manner.

Works well but has very manipulative ui which makes it hard to shop. They have sections that you can look through like chinese or fast food but if you select one, they just show you random restaurants instead of the section you chose. The pricing is also hard to follow since they change the prices of items to hide fees and it makes it hard to budget. Over all, the app works, it's just hard to use.

I had what I thought was a scathing review before, but the company has managed to outdo itself. Beyond terrible service, with dashers bringing the order to the wrong house or not picking it up at all, then having to deal with support to get a refund for a product they never delivered is too much. This service is supposed to make life easier, not more stressful. Far too expensive for the lackluster service they offer.

Used to be good... but now my fast food deliveries are always cold. I just get cold foods now. I have also found that Door Dash's fees are getting ludicrous. They charge on base prices... for example: a 2 for 1 deal at a restaurant that cost me $20, they charged a 12% fee on the estimated $40!! So a small meal with their fee, delivery AND other regulatory fees as they call it means a $20 meal is easily $30 or more. Too much. I hate Skip the Dishes but their fees are more reasonable.

The delivery fee and "service fee" are astronomically high and you WILL NOT get refunded that cost when something goes wrong. If you order a 5 dollar item, the bill at the end will be somewhere around 10 bucks. Then, when you dont get your item, you get 5 bucks back and lose the 5 you spent on the delivery fee, service fee and tip.... robbery.

98% of my orders are always messed up. Food orders always missing food, cold, late, order from the stores and missing things. go to the store all items will be in stock. when dd messes up the order says have to cancel but doesn't offer immediate refund they take payment immediately. No I dont want credits for money out of my bank. A refund takes up to a week. there has been nothing convenient with this app just messy orders. ppl live pay to pay. if they mess it up needs to refunded instantly

So I had a missing item that was $1.30. I reported it missing and was offered a refund of $1.02. If I hadn't caught it and talked to support I would have not been fully refunded. I texted it to a friend saying "thats weird" and they have had something similar occur. Keep an eye out on the price of the items you need refunded and the refund they offer you cause that discrepancy should have never happened. $0.28 isn't a lot but if they do this across the board it adds up

overall the app is ok but be carefull with the wolt+ subscription. It used to be monthly. Then it suddenly became annual by default. For those who use it only accasionally a few months per year it is now very easy to pay the annual price. The same for those who wants to try it only. The do not refund it, no wolt points neither. They made it the way people make a mistake and pay more.

Supposedly, customer service told me the rules/regulations do not require them to give refunds - when I didn't receive a food item that I ordered and paid for. I received 2 of the 3 things. They refunded me less than the cost of the missing item. No refund for the percentage of fees and tax either. I liked doordash until this experience. It's basically theft. I'm paying for a service. Didn't get what I paid for and didn't get properly refunded for what I paid for and didn't receive. Not worth it

I use it a lot, but there are a couple things that burn me repeatedly. You'll pay 2x what a meal costs. And it's not cost effective to buy only one item from a store. The app gives you a better deal on spending a certain amount, but it's often my luck that the store won't have the one needed item. So now I'm stuck paying for this other garbage I don't want and I'm not even getting what I actually need. I wish there was a built-in option to say, "If X item is out of stock, cancel entire order."

I just had an experience where my food wasn't delivered and they were supposed to issue a redelivery. The previous dasher who didn't deliver my food would still receive the tip if I didn't ask them to adjust it. There were ongoing issues with the redelivery so they canceled it. I asked them to credit my original payment back to me but they stated it was a credit as it used for the redelivery. And basically just said sorry. There was no acceptable solution. I don't know what's going on with them.

The convenience is still good. However the app needs an update that calculates which order is closer when you give drivers more than one order at a time. plenty of times I will wonder where my food is to see the GPS took the driver so out of the way to complete someone else's order just to drive all the way back to drop off mine. It would be more time efficient for everyone.

prices are glitched on some restaurants. for example, burgerking an 8 piece chicken fries meal in a large should be $11 or so.. But when you click it, it doubles to $22... the price of the order shouldn't be added to the price it's already showing. I can't order food from here. because I'd be paying double for a single item.

It used to be great but, for the last 6 months, I've gotten nothing but messed up orders. None of the drivers follow the directions. They'll leave at the door when I put "hand it to me". None of them answer the phone or respond to text messages and I believe this is mainly due to language barrier. I've learned that many migrants who can't speak English will use the identity of a resident to establish their account. Decided to uninstall. App itself is fine. Drivers causing issue

Constant issues with orders and 2nd time I've waited around for over an hour to have my order canceled because either the restaurant employees or the driver stole my food. Uninstalling at this point. I opted to pay more for the convenience and the fact I can't always leave work for food. But if this is gunna start becoming more of an issue, it's no longer convenient. It also took 3 drivers before I decided to message the last one to ask what was going on and he was able to let me know the issue.

I've been using this app for well-over a year without a problem. Expect some meals to arrive cold, as they use cyclists, FYI. However, I WILL NOT EVER USE this app again after my last order. Over 6 customer service people ended my "help" chat. I was charged roughly $200, when it should have been $98 odd! They not only charged my BANK, but AFTERPAY, as well! I sent photo evidence, but was dismissed as it having been impossible! I'm 54, and was spoken to like a kid. FRAUD reports filed! SHAME!

Dashers need to be trained better. Customer service becomes so hard to reach now. Never received my order, no word from my dasher. Never got a refund or door dash credits for the 30+ I spent. Called in several times just for them to do nothing. absolute waste. Order mistakes happens way too frequently and customers are always assed out because door dash doesn't train their dashers to do the right thing. Nor will they actually try to make it right to customers.

I am a big doordash user. But today's experience really disappointed me. My food was misdelievered which happens often at my apartment complex and I understand human error so that doesn't bother me too much. But when I contacted support, who are usually amazing, I was told I'd get a refund (I wasn't offered for my order to be redelivered or even asked if I'd prefer a refund or credits) and then the agent closed the chat and sent me credits instead. Hopefully no one else receives this experience.

They don't honor the price on the actual receipt for groceries. Any discount the shoppers receive in store is not reflected on your charge. Literally stealing money from people. $70 subtotal charge (before fees) vs $62 actually charged in store. I don't understand how y'all can be ok doing that when you already have sky-high service and response fees.

Only real issues I have are communication based. Couldn't find anywhere to contact my driver until after he delivered my order, and it wouldn't let me type up a rating for the resturant. So either the app doesn't have these options or the UI is so poor it doesn't make it clear how to do things. It's possible that my phone just wasn't displaying it properly, but that doesn't seem likely either.

I previously gave this app 5 stars because of the convenience it provided with getting food delivered and the deals it offered, but this app has slowly but drastically changed since my initial review. First of all, all the deals have dried up. Secondly the fees have become outrageous even with the subscription. Third, just check the price of food in the app vs on the restaurants website. Even base prices are super inflated by 25-40%. This is another doordash "fee" that's hidden from users.

This used to be an excellent app, but sadly Doordash doesn't hire drivers with integrity. Out of every 3 or 4 orders I make, 1 is guaranteed to end up stolen by the dasher. If it wasn't for the fact that Door Dash is cheaper than it's competition, I would use other delivery apps. They need to really push their drivers to have the utmost integrity with their delivery and so forth.

Many of times I've had negative experiences with Doordash. Even the support team. more times than NOT unfortunately. Items ordered are missing or taken to somewhere else. Then after you don't recieve what you paid for, they give fake apologies & tell you you can't be credited or refunded when you did not even ask for either one of those things! ubereats costs but if you're gonna use one id choose ubereats.

EDIT: Redoing the review to be more comprehensive. Support, both from the perspective of a Dasher and customer, is the only thing which this app lacks in some regard. The menu navigation is swift and easy, it's insanely easy to order food based on the promotions alone, and this is the only app I've seen where tipping after delivery is so seamless. Compared to other delivery services, too, it's not nearly as expensive. Definitely recommend over other delivery apps.

If I could rate it lower I would. Waiting OVER TWO HOURS for food delivery is insane ontop of the constant issues with drivers lately. Literally had one intentionally deliever to a completely different place & didn't tell me where it was because they 'didn't want to go around construction'. Or how half my order would be missing or I got someone's else's order. Sometimes they'll even replace a part of my order but not bother reaching out to see if that's what I even want or if I have allergies.

I liked this app until they refused to refund me for a ln over $90 membership charge that I wasn't going to use. I had a dashpass account, however I was not notified when it would be renewed. An over $90 charge went through my account to renew it today. I called to cancel and get it refunded on the same day and I was refused because the membership technicality renewed 2 month prior despite the payment not being processed until today. I'm fuming! I'll never be using this app again.

ordered food and it used my old address even though I'm not even near my old address nor didn't even put it on the app and it still used my old address. I tried to cancel and it just took my money and you can't even change the address. so there goes 60$ down the drain. (also the first time using the app and the driver was just sitting in the parking lot for way over 20) minutes)

its good, quite pricey and the deals get a bit frustrating sometimes or vanish but no matter how specific you make the instructions they almost always get lost and there's no message option, and when they call their English is usually so bad you struggle to communicate. add pictures to delivery instructions and a message feature please this app is the worst its not even that hard to find, its just down a driveway. you should have order confirmation after purchasing esp with afterpay too plz

I've been a Dashpass member for 2 years now and I love this app, I switched over to the annual plan after having 2-3 good experiences with the app. This has become my favourite main food delivery app and many of the drivers who have delivered my food are friendly and kind. I love that the app will notify you when your order is ready for pickup/has been picked up by the driver and also notify you again when they're approaching with your order. I also love the new perk to earn PC Optimum points.

While I really like the app and use it quite often for orders, 1 negative experience that prompted me to write this was regarding the system for their refunds. For example, just today I placed an order, and for whatever reason they never picked it up, then drove past it again and went away really far, I was waiting for 1 hour for food I never got, on top of that because the order status never changed from the initial picking up state, I wasnt given a refund, nor could I change the dasher!!

I love that I don't have to visit the supermarket and it works out cheaper for me as I don't grab things that catch my eye. However, some Dashers don't check the food quality as I've been given rotting fruit and veg. Leaving them a message in the app doesn't seem to make any difference. Twice I've received the delivery only to find they've left something behind at the checkout, that I've paid for. Still, overall I prefer Door Dash to doing it myself, I don't like shopping

Do not use this app. Everything I order something it is always wrong. Typically, it is forgotten items. it use to be i could contact them and speak with an agent and have someone deliver the correct items that were missing but now it is all automated. There solution is just to refund you the money for the items. Mean while, you have already paid the 20 percent tip for an incomplete order. The service is garbage.

Over the past months, I haven't had a car, so I've had to use this app and other apps to deliver me meals. This one has consistently disappointed me. Descriptions are "generated by DoorDash AI," and the photos I believe are uploaded by other consumers and chosen by DoorDash (sometimes they offer a few bucks if they use the photo you submitted). That said, it is not the restaurants misinforming me. It is DoorDash over and over, and they don't offer any resolution when I report to them. I am done.

I hate the way the app displays restaurants now! And the option for Dashpass is gone! I don't want flower stores on my feed, I don't need groceries, or pet items! I want restaurants! I don't want them showing what's new, try something new, new in your area, on and on scrolling until I actually get to restaurants! I like to scroll and see what catches my attention in the location that I am currently in! It's like 100 ads and then there's food! Nothing was wrong with it before! this is irritating

Customer service went to hell after they switched to Ai. I've had multiple issues with missing items in my orders. I'll reach out to customer support and only get ai. I'll tell it my situation. Then they say they'll get back to me with after the review. Then they deny my refund. I was missing practically my whole order of five items only received one item. They wouldn't refund me for the missing items. But I went ahead and reordered my missing items because I was assuming I was getting a refund.

Idk what happened, but my orders keep getting sent to the furthest (but still somewhat local) restaurants. This extends the travel time of ordered food, which can result in poor quality. I'm sure the drivers picking up these orders are wondering why they're picking food up in one town and driving it to another. You'd think for the amount of money the BS fees for using their service are, this wouldn't be an issue.

I use to love this app. I need it to get my groceries and items . lately I have been getting orders wrong or things missing or items mishandled also delivered to the wrong house. I am aware that mistakes happen but every time I report a mistake they tell me I can't get refund . I had to call and get transferred a couple of times for an order that I was overcharged over $20 because there was an item on my receipt with an item i never requested. I am so close to canceling my membership.
Very convenient. Easy to use. Offers many good options of food and groceries.

Was an almost 4 year subscriber to DashPass. Wasted half an hour trying to troubleshoot the app failing all payment methods. There's a thread on reddit about it from someone else so it's obviously a bug. No point in paying for DashPass when you can't even place an order. The app has gotten worse and more difficult to navigate over the years. Customer support is hard to find unless you complain about an order.

Lately, I can always count on having a missing item, cold, flavorless, and/or food that looks like someone stepped on it. I pay $30 with tip to begrudgingly eat half of 1 decent item of like 3 or 4 items. I didn't get a refund for my missing brownie and sauce for my burrito and I couldn't drink the coffee because it tasted like spit (not saying the dasher spit in it, it was just poorly made).

Used DoorDash 4 times for grocery delivery. Every single time items where missing, wrong item or they charged more then the items I received. First 2 times I got compensated. 3rd time no longer, but it wasn't a big amount so I let it slide. 4th time they charged me $60 too much and were not willing to compensate. What!? How is that even legal. Will never use again.

I ordered, everything was fine. The restaurant didn't pick up the order in the system in time (3 minutes) and the app's system decided to cancel it without notifying me in any way. I was waiting for my order and when it got suspicious that it is still not here I check and saw that it is cancelled by the app. Horrible first experience. I will not use the app again. there is a plenty of other delivery apps which actually work. DO NOT RECOMMEND AT ALL.

My experience so far was excellent. However a recent event made me uninstall. I placed a food order and the restaurant didn't have an item. Even though the restaurant communicated this with Wolt they did not reach out to me to inform me. The result was that in order to please my guests I was left without something to eat. However, my disappointment is the way they handled this. In the past in a similar event they offered free coupons etc. but not now. Just refund of missing item.

This app/company is always lying, the countdown timer is increasing and off most of the time. When they mess up they never give you proper response or compensation. Support did not respond to me in over 3 hours due to "high demand", I couldn't connect to anyone. This happens quite often. My recommendation is to use ANY other delivery app. Being popular does not mean being good

Among the worst delivery services I've used. High prices, but the most annoying thing is the application itself. When you change products in the cart, it completely resets them, and payments are collected at the initial amount, even if some products are not in stock, and they don't even refund the money unless you ask for it on the support chat. Not to mention the overloaded UI...

I do not recommend using this app if you actually expect your order to be delivered to your door. Delivery time estimates are unreliable, and there’s always a chance your courier will casually drive to another city instead. At that point, you’ll be invited to pick up your own order, which, of course, cannot be cancelled because it’s already “ready”. So if you enjoy unexpected trips to retrieve your food yourself, this app is perfect. 👍👍👍

it's a decent app. not perfect, but not bad either. Positives: - good customer service. - easy to navigate. - plenty of stores to choose from. Negatives: - upped prices. everything costs extra when ordering from wolt, as stores charge extra to cover the fee they have to pay for inclusion. on top; you have to pay a service fee + a delivery fee set by wolt, resulting in less reason to use the app, especially when living in a big city where most stores are within walking distance.

This is the worst app and service I’ve experienced. I’ve ordered twice from nearby restaurants, and both times it took over an hour and a half for the food to arrive. The restaurant prepared the food quickly, but the delivery took far too long. Instead of bringing my order directly to my home — which was the closest location — the driver made other deliveries first. As a result, my food was taken all over town, arrived cold, and was no longer enjoyable to eat. Very disappointing experience.

Seriously the worst delivery app. How on earth do drivers get away with accepting orders, then refusing to deliver them? Meaning you are stuck waiting ages for a new driver? Every. Single. Time. Estimated time is completely random - got to wait over 20-30 minutes on top of whatever they say. Avoid and use a different app. I'm sick of the nonsense service.

Made scheduled order, didn't get it, had 40 minutes conversation with the support: "...it looks like another courier might have pick up the wrong order, so this courier does not have your order, I am so sorry about this unpleasant situation Dmitrijs! 🥺 I have to cancel this order since there is no way to track it". "no way to track it", fantastic unprofessionalism!

I haven't ordered through Wolt for over a month. I do not remember signing to Wolt+. Yet I was billed 5€ for membership basically for nothing. I think this is predatory. Why should I pay for membership for a delivery app?! Ordering the same item multiple times but with different sub options is impossible. I have to add the exact same item with same choices. Any modification applies to every item of that type.

Horrible in any aspect. Unintuitive interface. Took over Tazz and didn't keep the actual readable users reviews. All the restaurants menus are significantly more expensive than on other food apps (I would presume higher fees). If I hadn't already paid the eMag genius yearly I would cancel this with zero hesitation. Unfortunately I have to wait for it to expire

This service has become absolutely terrible and unreliable. The waiting times are not even a guess, they're worse than that. There's constantly issues with larger orders where they'll send a bike courier to pick up an order that's too large for them and the when they figure it out have to send another courier with the car. We've tried solving this by putting a note in the order but it didn't help. This happened multiple times.

Used to be a good app, when something went wrong support was responsive and appropriate with refunds. Seems like the policies have changed. On top of the ridiculous prices, that they are sneaky about, by not indicating the actual product price what a restaurant would charge on the place and then additionally charging a "service cost".

Fees have become too expensive. There are areas in Malta that are not properly catered for. I am from the centre west region and it is impossible to get a delivery without spending 4-5 euros on delivery fees. There was a time when Wolt was different before, but now it became money hungry like many other companies. Reduce delivery fees and seek compromise with the outlets instead of dumping the fees on the customers.

Had an app error which caused my message to the restaurant to not be delivered. As a person with lots of allergies I always write a message to the restaurant. I have received my food with all the things I cannot have just to notice my message to the restaurant has not been sent. Called the restaurant, which told me to talk to the app support. The app support refunded me only half of the money.... this is awful..... I don't recommend them!

so bad it is almost impressive. you cannot filter by szèp card for a while now but now sometimes the label is not even put out. i have to check every restaurant if i can eat there by szèp card by oytting something in the cart and then check the payment method. wolt used to be so good and now it is only used because it's only foodora and wolt are on the market...makes me rather leave the house and go to the restaurant then use this dogshit app

horrible customer service, absolutely grotesque experience. order was late. contacted customer service to cancel the order because I had to leave for the airport. customer service replied 45mins AFTER being connected to the representative. and of course the answer was "we can do nothing" left the order for the hotel staff. there are other apps, do not recommend this one

zero customer service, order hasn't been delivered for over two hours. neither the app shows the status and customer service hasn't responded to multiple attempts in the last 1 hour. it's amazing how companies have been allowed to run massive operations with zero customer service

My account was auto banned due to a software bug, and customer support did not provide a solution. Then, I tried creating a new account, scheduled two birthday orders in advance, and was informed the platform was broken the day of the birthday. Terrible app and awful customer service.

Presenting us dirty pop-up ads to sell us garbage while I'm trying to order food is outrageous. Remove those ads that you throw in my face or allow me at least to opt out. This practice is very greedy and I'm one step away from uninstalling it forever. Teach your AI coding agent to properly save the state of the filters!!! turning orientation loses all the entered information, and the bottom sheet is impossible to use in landscape. Maybe rehire humans who can think?

Had a terrible experience with customer support. I've been ordering food, groceries, supplements etc. on WOLT for four years and after today's order after which I didn't get what I ordered I got a quarter of my order back with a message "just order tomorrow". Zero empathy and terrible problem solving from customer support. Will switch to Glovo after my three-year subscription ends. Farewell.

They changed how the total due amount is displayed and now it's not clear how much you will be charged in the end. You also get vague 'deal applied' and 'x% will be calculated at checkout' notifications, but you don't know what they relate to. The experience has deteriored, will likely not renew Wolt+ subscription once it expires.

Overall I find it easy to use but I find an inconsistentcy in setting up filters. The buttons are not always visible. I also like to order several hours in advance so the food comes when I want it. I frequently get notifications that the restaurant is very busy and the order will be late. Then I get one that it will be earlier. The food usually comes on time. It is very annoying. I have complained to Wolt many times but I never got a response 🙁.

perfect app for getting ur delivery at the right address. all the couriers are really nice and polite. something id recommend working on is removing the restaurants that dont take orders from x to x time from the database until they are opened and taking orders, it confuses customers and orders are placed by mistake

Just 1 tiny complaint. There should be an option to tip the delivery guy after the order is delivered. Because sometimes you just know that the order may be messed up due to various reasons and if the order is good, then to tip the rider on the evaluation step. The rest is awesome. Lots of categories, nice interface, reminders for business orders. Nice!

Used Wolt in norway for quite a while now. Deliveries are often late. Missing things. Couriers dont, or barely speak norwegian or english, which makes it hard to communicate. Gotten wrong orders quite a few times, cold food quite a few times. Today the order was picked up then driven around for 50min, whilst it is a 5min drive, and being delivered cold. Support has usually been helpful, but when they don't fully refund deliveries like that, it just doesnt make you want to support them anymore.

Very user friendly app, good support even for English speaking customers, transparent pricing, If possible, needs better support on folding phones/tablets, UI does not scale/adapt correctly, menus and buttons get hidden. the order tracking is very difficult with everything in blue color. if the destination and the courier tracking color can be more user friendly, it will help with user tracking

The new update is terrible, simply awful! The search function doesn't work anymore - when you search for something now it is impossible to make sense of the results, you cannot properly sort by any criterion and lots of shops and products are hidden, order is all messed up and disorganised. Please revert back to how it was before the update! UPDATE: App isn't even opening now. At all.

not recomended at all .. when you order 2 items and courier didnt find the most expensive item .. will not inform you .. and get the order to you .. you have to pay the full order amount with all service fee and delivery fee .. then when you compalin .. they return the amount of the expensive item as credit in wolt (to use them again ) without service fee and dilvery fee.. so the cheaper item in the order, finally its final price will be more 100%
won't even let me create an account. gives me an error message everytime I try to log on.

Ordered groceries from Wolt Market in Belgrade, Serbia. The order was marked as delivered in the app, but it never arrived. Support replied to my message only after 2 hours and gave me Wolt credits. I immediately ordered again from another place, and they delivered the wrong, cheaper order. I contacted support once more, and this time they never replied at all. They basically took my money and delivered something I cannot eat. Also, there was no way to contact the courier directly in any way.

Lately my experience with this app has been completely negative, whenever i'm ordering anything the delivery times are insane 60-70 min for a 6 km delivery and the store needs just 10 min to get the order done, but wolt gives its driver 3-4 different orders to deliver and until i get my food its already completely cold. Unacceptable!

Used to be good when I first started. Over the past year, the quality has consistently dropped. The focus has clearly shifted to squeezing more money out of users (priority delivery) rather than providing good service, now I constantly get cold food. This is feedback from a Wolt+ user with 250+ orders.

becarful. they do not care if you were charged once,twice or even three times they will not help you with it. I was charged twice I literally saw the change in my account but I was told no it was a pending Authorisation. well that pending Authorisation went through and so did the extra charge this morning. 727 shekels for groceries. I will not use this app again wow

Have just tried self-pickup, and the experience was underwhelming: the estimate was off — the app would keep showing fifteen minutes to go, and then poof, the order was ready much sooner than expected. And when I arrived, the app had closed the screen with the order number already; had I not remembered it, I would have been lost. The process has obviously not been tested very well or thought through much.

Bad UX, you put "Throw out" instead of "Add toppings" , the title text is the same font size like the rest of the list items and has no priority when reading. Also you have "You've chosen maximum" below it, with title makes it even more confusing. Until you fix this, the rating will stay as is.

I ordered via Wolt mainly for one item that made up most of the order. The restaurant canceled it due to being out of stock but didn’t inform me or give me the option to cancel—they just sent the rest. I paid ~₪200 and got items worth ~₪40, which I wouldn’t have ordered otherwise. Wolt only gave a partial delivery refund. This isn’t about money, it’s about principle—very poor communication.

Long time ago, they were pretty good with delivery servis. Nowdays, I'm struggling to receive almost every delivery. Too many deliveries I have to navigate to my building, and usually there is need to be on the street to receive your delivery because courier cannot find your building. For this price that is unacceptable. I'm not a sheep.

Wolt is awesome! Humble people working there for sure. update: back at point zero. app doesn't work any longer, can't log in, and for 3 days they didn't solve an issue with 20% at Pizza Hut which were not available on Wolt for a whole week. I had a terrible end of the week. they have pretty bad customer support and communication, unfortunately, so here I am reverting to 1 star. they don't care to solve issues before the weekend and rather leave you in the dark. new update: I can't log in!!!

The shop made a mistake in my delivery, the support took more than an hour to resolve the case. And after that had to wait for a courier to take back the wrong item Support previously was OK, now it's AI that cant resolve a basic issue - missing items in order.

My account was permanently blocked for “multiple accounts” even though I only had one. Support was useless, copy-paste replies with no explanation and no appeal. They even said a new account wouldn’t work, so I’m effectively banned for no reason. Their system clearly flags legitimate users (e.g. shared Wi-Fi), but there’s no way to fix mistakes. Very unfair and frustrating experience.

no support you just talk with bots, I asked for a refund 20 minutes before my order arrived because it was showing the wrong store that was in another location than the one I ordered from and it came wrong they didn't give my money back and the bot said he can give only 50% percent of the order for refund when the whole order was wrong, I canceled my subscription right away and uninstalled the app, terrible service they don't know how to treat the costumers and actually stole my money.

It's scam, the prices are ramped up a lot, at the checkout they add so many fees as well and wolt+ doesn't change anything as well. You still need to pay for delivery. Then they lie about a selected item being on discount. It said 40% off selected item. The price was 9,10 eur and now it's 8,19 eur. So how is that 40% discount exactly. You go to checkout and in the end you have to pay over 11 euros even with wolt+.

Few small glitches but generally very good.. Doesn't always refresh automatically and on initially confirming the order, although notifications show it has been received, the app's main screen continues to say that the order is being submitted... However, despite these minor things, the app worked brilliantly, was simple to use and efficient.

I've been using this app for years now, ordered items from Wolt market and noticed that my total amount of money changed in order, checked my order and half of items just vanished and two items were removed. Contacted Wolt support - no answer only "we are busy", contacted courier and told him something is messed up, contacted venue they told that they will contact wolt support. Courier came to me with this "half order". 30m later wolt support answered, 30m later he tells "im unable to assist"

I' m a loyal Wolt user, but the recent changes are a huge step backward. The 'Challenges' were a great way to earn points and felt rewarding. Replacing them with a credit system where you earn absolutely nothing from orders has removed any incentive to choose Wolt over competitors. To make matters worse, whenever you reach out for help, the customer support only provides, copy-pasted responses that don't address the actual issues. Technically the app is good , I don' t agree the organization
The workout didn't change for a year.. all year along worked out the same muscles

Every time we ordered from walt was a game of "what will they f up this time". they "forget" to bring the drink 50% of the time, even though we order from different restaurants each order. sometimes the driver just goes missing, no notice or anything, and comes to us after 3-4 hours with the food that was once hot freezing. wrong orders are very common. prices are high.

The worst app I've seen. I can't change the email, can't change the phone, can't change the address, can't change anything. It's the worst app I've seen. Meanwhile, the app is tracking you 11 ad companies are stealing your email address, your name, your phone model, your OS version and passwords to name just 20% of what they steal from you. ifood is the worst data thief there is. Not just this, they never send the code to the email provided. Stay away from this app. It steals your passwords too.

If you can’t deliver, don’t offer it! I waited over an hour just to have my delivery postponed twice—first 20 minutes, then another 15. When I tried to cancel, they stopped replying, and I’m still waiting for a resolution. Hungry, annoyed, and now needing to order elsewhere—plus they had the nerve to offer 5 reais as compensation!

iFood is a really useful app, it helps me a lot when I have to order something. But, sometimes I have problems with some restaurants and I can't cancel my orders by an easiest way, or something like this. Besides, when I have to get out soon, I rely on restaurant's delivery time, which isn't always correct and let me reach late at my appointments. I know that some of these problems aren't iFood's fault, but maybe they can be more rigorous with these kind of restaurants.

Terrible consumer experience. Some restaurants doesn't support a kind of payment, so it should have a third party to do payments whitin the app. Minimum order price shouldn't exist. If I want to order something, it doesn't matter what is the price, I should be able to, but minimum order price doesn't let you do so. And most foods are greatly overpriced for what they really are, because of the app taxes in restaurants. Delivery tracking in real time only works if the delivery man is hired fromAPP

There are indeed a lot of options. However, the app itself is full of bugs, with awful user experience: my cards get randomly refused depending on the day (some days they work, some days they don't, back and forth!), an order with a refused payment method is counted as a duplicate order, the Google Pay integration is now broken, and I just had an order that was counted as successfully placed but which simply disappeared when I checked on where it was - not even in the history. Terrible.

The app itself is pretty good, it's easy to use and there are a ton of options to pick from. HOWEVER. The prices are (a lot) higher than what you would usually pay, due to heavy taxes charged by iFood. Also, there was a recent policy change which benefits delivery guys who don't want to work. Everytime I order something I am afraid it won't arrive, and this has indeed happened 3+ times in the past few weeks. I don't use the app as much as I used to, as to avoid fruitless waiting and chargeback

It used to be easy to order, now it's a nuisance, depending on where I am. Here at Lorena/SP, restaurants that are a few blocks away have delivery fee greater than the order prices! When I reach the free delivery threshold, all payment methods are refused (the app actually froze on the error screen, last time!) This has happened for at least two months, and is getting worse!

Most restaurants don't have a cellphone for contact, so if you notice a problem after a delivery is made you will not be able to contact them. I ran into that two times already and they sent my money back, but its frustrating, before this "safe delivery code" I always solved any problems through the chat with the restaurant. Also, the section to get help from ifood is really slow.

If you're a foreigner in Brazil you won't be able to order anything or even use the app cause to create your account you can only put a Brazilian phone number, so if you don't have one, you don't get to create an account and don't even get to order any food, i literally starved, sucks

It offers the WORST service EVER!!! Many times foods arrive way after the estinated time of delivery!! Not just 10 or 20 minutes. Almost 2 hours!!! I truly wantex to cancel my order but its freaking app doesn't even allow me to and I had to call the restaurant and a woman said it would be delivered in 15 minutes. It's been way over 15 minutes and the foods hasn't arrived yet. It's so frustrating!!! NEVER EVER USE THIS!!

Spams you with discount offers that are pure bait. They supposedly work with a few select restaurants, but after you take the time to choose you find that they no longer apply. Baited. I usually have about 3-5 of these offers at any time and none of them ever work. Payments fail to process for no apparent reason. Makes me spend half an hour talking to my credit card processor to find out the order was not declined, it was never submitted to them. This used to be great. Nowadays I'm using Uber Eats more and more because of all this BS.

Pretty bad. It takes very long to order a single meal. Also. It is impossible to pay. I had my credit card configured and had errors with NO details when paying. I will try one more time later. If same headache happens, I will uninstall it. Updating from 2 to 1 star. There is no notification when my order is cancelled. Google pay does not work. Some other bad stuff as well

Not bad, I had issues with my card for a long time, but finally it seems that they fixed it. The orders are usually on time. Support is a big problem though, it is often very hard to get in contact with a human agent for a relevant issue. Also spams useless notifications

Quite bad overall. Prices are high because the app takes a big chunk from restaurant profits, causing them to jack up their prices. Payment options are severely limited for such a popular app, they also frequently fail to work. The app itself is quite predatory and will ABSOLUTELY SPAM your phone with notifications. Also somewhat difficult to effectively navigate but that's subjective, I guess.

I've been looking for something like this for a long time. For me, it replaces a personal trainer. Great layout, no bugs, all the exercises explained clearly, easy to customize. No more needing to plan or think about my routines.

I hate this app. It keeps wanting to add 20 reais to any order I place, even after it confirms that there are no additional costs. Then, it can't give the correct code for me to make an app payment. It is expensive and does not work well. I installed and uninstalled it in less than thirty minutes. I will never install this again. I advise you to not install this app either. Use ubereats or contact the restaurant directly for a cheaper and quicker delivery.

I'm unable to control the types of iFood notifications on my Android. They send numerous promotional messages every day and I have no way of stopping this unless completely disabling notifications in the app settings. This means that if I fail to turn notifications on when expecting a delivery I may miss a message from the delivery person. This happened the other day.

Here's the real story, the APP works good and there is alot of variety to choose from , but if your order is wrong or they don't deliver, the restaurant or store will blame ifood for the issue and they will keep your money without resolving the issue, another way of taking your funds and not delivering the goods. They will drag it out and make the smallest issue a big problem, typical of food service with no attendance to help their clients. Eu não gosto ifood app, porque muito problemas.

Very bad app, hard to enter data, does not accept my credit cards. Does not have customer support. Still the worst in the market. Tried to update my credit card data, did not work. Tried to order and pay at delivery, delayed and I had to cancel. Just had another bad experience. Unbelievable.

The interface is user-friendly and visually appealing. However, requiring a Brazilian phone number to place a food delivery order hinders foreigners from using the service. This unnecessary restriction meant I couldn't actually order food, and I unfortunately had to uninstall the app.

The first thing that brings down the score is the reliability of the delivery service iFood offers to restaurants, as I've had orders cancelled because the delivery guy refused to collect and deliver them. More importantly though, I recently made an order but didn't receive my food. The restaurant wouldn't answer the phone so I left a review, choosing the 'food didn't arrive' option. However, since then I've tried calling iFood without any answer, and I've recieved no messages through the app :(

As a foreigner and I can't use my card like everyone else's do , I have to pick only places that accept me to pay with the card on delivery which doesn't work everytimeand on top of that I miss a bunch of other places I would love to try only because your methods of payments. It's very inconvenient also the fact I can't tip the delivery person after a great service. So I will give you one star for now and hopefully someone will fix this issue so travellers without CPF can use your app like u all

All around pretty good, but everything on iFood is still more expensive than what you buy at restaurants and fast-food. Some stores are out-right closed or unavailable for months, yet they stay online, not working at all. This app needs some serious management and not only cater towards rich countries. I'm in Brazil by the way, and I know how good the service is in the US and how much it lacks over here and most other third world countries.

The app is severely annoying for foreigners for two reasons. First, you can not pay with any option that is not in person as you need a CPF for that and it is very bothersome to get one. Second, the in person payment option is not always available because ifood does not provide sufficient machines to the delivery personal and so you need to wait randomly and annoyingly until one delivery person with a machine is avaliable. This sucks as you are probably somebody who values his or her time.

Second time and no interesting options. It was supposed to have a 1 Brazilian Real offers and there wasn't, like a false merchant just to capture more users. The 75% discount were about so many terribly expensive items which make nonsense to order. That's all for me about iFood. No plans to try it anymore.

Normally it works just fine, but more than once I've ordered something and for some reason the app tells me there has been a problem, so I go and order again. The thing is, both of them arrive and I end up having twice the food I wanted, which means I have to spend twice the money I would have normally.

the establishments are good, however, the Ifood company has been quite abusive. has now started charging a fee for orders less than $20, and that just doesn't make sense. This app purports to be free, but charges to be used by both parties (store and end customer) it's not free then. I recommend that merchants and customers migrate to other smaller but not abusive apps. here in my city I'm testing AiQFome. I'm having a great experience. And the best: REALLY FREE. I don't pay any fees... 😜

Too bad, there's no guarantee that an order will ever arrive, also - at least in Brasil - there's no proper way to get help, no phone number to call ifood to tell the issue you r having with the restaurant or the deliveryman, You r told to try a chat in the app that takes ages for someone to answer, mainly in the evening when you r most likely to order smt, of course the restaurant closes before Ifood finally tries to help you. [Edit] Online payment is now broken and chatting doesn't help.

I ordered food in a restaurant that confirmed my order and closed. I can't cancel the order for the hell of it (it's been late for over half an hour already, I called the restaurant, and they said my order is not coming). There's no support function to be found in the app, and I can't get into the refund process.

The app showed a “3 for 1” promo. Naturally, I expected 3 items for the price of 1. I added a burger, but only got one. If it’s 3-for-1, why not add 3 automatically? Or at least block checkout until the promo is applied? That’s basic UX and defensive coding. Instead, it feels like the app is designed to profit from people’s unawareness. If they had proper UI writers or reviewed their Portuguese, this wouldn’t happen.
seems great so far, and I'm probably going to upgrade to the full thing.
Awesome, good value for the premium version, but you can't add images to the custom exercises, so I'll keep looking for the perfect app.

If you're using an external monitor and switches back to device your shopping cart is gone. When you check out and click Fazer Pedido when all is ready to go and pay with Beneficios card, it simply refreshes the screen. Then you try going over all the purchases again using the browser, but your card is not there either. Useless app lacking software testing services before release to production.

Every time I want to order food or buy anything, I have to talk to customer service to prevent my credit VISA card from being blocked. I have asked them many times to find a permanent solution for this annoying problem, but they don't seem to care. Waiting for their response also takes a long time as well. If I could give 0 stars, I would. My card works fine with any other apps. Update 19 Oct 25 I tried to order food on Sunday at 17:52. Now it's 21:50. I still can't pay. I waited for hours. 👎

A bad app for tourists, first thing, they don't accept my Italian credit card, despite the fact that when I go to the restaurant and pay with my card, it works well, but when I order delivery through the app, it doesn't accept my card. Secondly, most of the restaurants on the app require CPF! I am a tourist, why would I get a CPF? Am I not allowed to order food delivery?! A useless app.

This app just don't work with my Moto G4 Plus. Keeps lagging and when I needed help to solve a address problem, the app just can't make a chat with me and the restaurant. Seriously, ANNOYING! I'm not going to use it anymore. And even some friends say that the percentage that you pay for IFood don't worth the time you're not spending going to the restaurant to buy. Some foods literally double the price just because the IFood cut. Isn't IFood's fault? I'm not so sure! A lower cut isn't better? Bye

The app does the bare minimum. But the prices of the restaurants are robbing people blind. Uninstalling, things are way, way, way too expensive. Plus the delivery rate of R$ 30 or above, it's too much for 2 or 3 km. Also, they charge your card before the food comes and don't deliver it. The delivery rate is sometimes more expensive than the food itself. Also, no international credit cards and phone numbers are accepted, not to mention CPF or CNPJ, not everybody has those. So, bye-bye.

Completely worthless! If you don't have a number in Brazil not allowed to use the app. Shocking that in a place like Rio they wouldn't let tourists order food for delivery. We don't have cars. Of course we want to order food for delivery! What a terrible business decision. Don't download the app.

Horrible experience for foreigners. I spent over an hour researching and setting up a complicated order. When my cart was full I tried to check out and none of the payment options would work without a Brazilian citizen number. I'm not a Brazilian! Such a waste of time.

too expensive, few cupons, I just don’t use Uber eats because it hasn't gotten well yet in my town. All the fees are higher than 10 reais and every thing is more expensive than in other food apps... I hope never have to use this app again , too expensive here in brazil, like everything else. Thos app must work nicely up in rich countries, but in junk countries like mine this app works awfully.

Good app, but no way to order with a phone number from outside of Brazil and asked to confirm the contact number even though a Brazilian phone number was provided. No way for a foreigner to have a CPF as well. Please make the account creation and ordering process simpler and more intuitive.

Payment online from an international card doesn't work even with a CPF, google pay doesn't work, if I filter payments on delivery it still gives a list of restaurants that won't accept that option. You loose so much time with this app. It has potential to be good because rappi's platform is awful (same restaurant won't have half the products) and uber eats no longer works in Brasil. They have potential to completely corner the market, but they don't want to get paid so rappi is the only choice left.

The app is really great when it comes to make ordering food easy. But there is an issue that is making me migrate to other services: I keep constantly getting notifications that a coupon os available, just to find out that there is nothing on the app, baiting me.

I actually don't know why I gave so many chances to this app. First of all their coupons are definitely a lie. Never works, has a lot restrictions. Second: tell me who is your software engineering because the payment method never works. This app was good only to fill my cellphone memory. Completely unsatisfied!

HIGHLY RECOMMEND FOR BEGGINERS, gives you a Free Routine to follow, And Also Gives other routines for free, And Guides A begginer easily other than other Apps that let's you do it by your own without knowing what it actually makes you gain, The app Also compares Other similar exercises easily and Highlights muscles from Lowest to brightest on where the exercise focuses more. And each Routine gives how many reps you'd do. Which is a good App for Working out

This app is fantastic. I was going to complain that routines required a set weight (I've been off for a year's time), only to notice that they have added an option that automatically sets the weight from 1RM or previous. This was basically the only thing I was missing, so I am definitely subscribing again. I will say that the free tier is a bit too naggy in my opinion, though. I think the added features are sufficient, so I would drop the nag screen when opening the app, personally.

I've tried a bunch of workout tracker apps over the years, but this one truly stands out. The design is clean and easy to navigate, and it strikes the perfect balance between simplicity and powerful features. I can track my gym sessions, log sets and reps, and see progress over time, all without getting overwhelmed.

I really love this app! I'm still pretty new to the gym so a lot of the exercises I don't feel because I'm not doing them correctly however, this app has videos inside the app that help you. On top of that, I love how the app doesn't force you to pay. A lot of the other apps I've tried out for, you only get like 3 free workouts and then you have to pay however, with this app, you get a free amount per week and you get to choose your workout days which is nice.

Terrific app, with great insights and loads of exercises I can leverage to create my own workouts. I was searching for ages for a great dumbbell workout app, but a lot of the popular ones were missing some of my favourite exercises and had what I would say are essential features missing or poorly implemented - been really happy with this app so far as it has everything I wanted and more! Recently decided to go for the premium subscription too - excited to see how development progresses!

Aerialist Fitness Tracker! Ok, this app is not exactly made for aerial silks conditioning, but being able to create my own exercises makes it perfect. I lift weights, but the majority of my workouts are bodyweight / calisthenics. Considering aerialists have to hold themselves 20 feet up with bare hand orbent knees hanging over a metal bar or fabric. I also have attention/focus issues. Having this tool is going to really help me stay accountable and organized. I just may benefit to purchase.

I love how customable everything is. The customer service is super quick and friendly, too. I had a few questions before downloading or purchasing a plan, and they got back to me right away. At $55/year for premium membership, you can't go wrong.

I just love that the free tier is so full of features. I'm not fan of paying a subscription up front before using it or falling in love with the app (like I'm about to do with this one). After trying pretty much all workout and finess apps in the store I really think this one is the best so far and the premium tier is worth it just to be able to log more than twice a week and get metrics and graphs of your progress. LOVING IT. It has so much potentiel.

Less user friendly than Hevy. Not as many onboard exercises available and nothing to show how they are done. Creating an exercise isn't as easy as with the other app. After trying out both, I subscribed to Premium on the other app and uninstalled this one. Edit: Because you quickly responded and in such a polite way, I increased my review to three stars for good customer service.

I have downloaded this app after looking around for some affordable without all the bloat BS that's most won't need, I definitely enjoying this so far. Only improvements I would like to see is -INSTRUCTIONS include a show or take you to images rather just YouTube videos. For me it'll make sense as soon as I see pic, rather watching talking for a few minutes before they get to the point.

i like the first impression. this is the kind of app im looking for. it feels both fun and powerful. and some game feel while maintaining minimal user-friendly design. i face issue/bug that the RTL languages like arabic breaks the some of app alignment. i have to change my phone lang to english to fix that. hope you fix that issue and makes the app looks same for both RTL and LTR languages.

I do not expect miracles The app targets arms, chest and abs. No leg day so far. The good side, the app gets me to be active most days for an extra 20 minutes or so. The motivation still has to come from the user. Decent exercises without any equipment other than a mat and a chair or bench. 3 day cycle, day one is rather push up intensive. It will help my fitness level during the winter days, but I am not expecting miracles

Committed to exercise 6 daysa week following several routines presented by the app, and with a good diet (nothing extreme) I have lost 36 kgs in 4 months. I have opted to the paid version of the app although you can get the benefits in the free version with ads. The app keeps a good record of your progress and can give you reminders. There are a variety of workout routines assorted to specific needs. I would only recommend to the developers to add the ability to create a custom workout.

Instructions are great (video, written, including common mistakes), no complaints there. The multiple built in monthly plans is great for a beginner to just pick one and go. Same with the varying levels and ability to adjust difficulty or replace any exercise at will (the recommendations for similar, harder, easier are also great) Could be better: I really need a way to star/favorite routines and exercises and 'block' certain exercises too so they wont show up in routines.

I really loved the app. i can burn so many calories without any equipment. the curated exercises make sure to stretch relevant body parts. to the developer - thank you so much, can you please also include exercises using machines? to the users - breathing is the most important thing, if you control your breathing and posture you will feel the sensation to the respective body part that you exercised on

Great app, perfect structural routine tailored specifically for various goals. This doesn't just keep you fit, it improves discipline, health and helps reprogram your mind and body to be more active everyday. it's my go to app every morning, and I think you should make it yours too.

Amazing home workout app! 💪 Easy exercises without equipment, perfect for beginners and advanced users. Clear instructions, great workout plans, and very helpful for fitness at home. I feel stronger and more active after using this app. Highly recommended for anyone who wants to stay fit without going to the gym! 🔥

I’ve tried dozens of fitness apps, but this one finally nailed the balance between variety, accessibility, and actual results. Here is why it stands out: Smart Personalization: From day one, the app tailored a plan to my specific fitness level. It doesn’t just throw random exercises at me; the progression feels logical, challenging me just enough to see progress without causing burnout. Minimal Equipment, Maximum Impact: I love that I can filter workouts based on what I have on hand. Whether I’m

I couldn't find any exercises that included my barbell and setting up custom routines does not appear to be a focus. Uninstalling and trying a different app.
great app. it's absolutely free and almost add free. developers are not greedy.

Application prometteuse. J'aime beaucoup les designs qui sont épurés des différents groupes musculaires mais efficaces et didactiques. LinkedIn is an excellent platform for professionals to connect, learn, and grow. It offers great tools for networking, job searching, and sharing expertise. The clean design and easy navigation make it user-friendly, and the tailored job recommendations are very helpful. However, improving messaging features and reducing irrelevant notifications could make it even better. Overall, LinkedIn is a must-have for career development and professional growth!

While I'm a fan of LinkedIn, one could argue that the platform was designed to be utilized on a desktop. However, I believe that the developers of the app have done an admirable job (and continue to improve the app experience) ensuring that I can, almost, do everything on the app, that I can do on the desktop version seamlessly.

Discord has been pretty good for the most part. however, after an update near the beginning of February, the search function in private messages/chat groups has broken to the point of being almost completely unusable. you can search, but it's hard to read because of how the content glitches down the screen repeatedly. and you can't click on any messages in the results to go to the original message. they release these updates as "Stable" when they're not and don't even provide a way to rollback.

A way to connect gamers and friends with reach other. It allows us to have servers and group calls which makes it super easy to talk to multiple people. Recently however gifs seem to lag the mobile application quite heavily, making it almost impossible to send anything from the gif browser. Even a recent downtime seemed to concern me as I don't have a better way to chat with friends.

Edit #2 Just when I thought discord couldn't get any worse. This app is a dumpster fire. Edit: This app has been going downhill for Android, and it's currently at the worst of it's ever been. Even after uninstalling and reinstalling, 50% of the time I can't even send out a message. There have been so many new bugs and glitches on the Android app over the last year plus, it boggles my mind. Fix your app on Android please. I'm happy with discord. Just not happy enough to write a lengthy review.

I have encountered so many glitches since the 2023 UI update, and it feels like so many more are popping up. Videos won't load. Clicking on a server icon in the keyboard to jump to that server's emojis works half the time. Profile won't save correctly. Can't send videos above 12-13mb? Some images are huge and cut in half. How it has 4.3 stars is a mystery to me. I would have hoped for better from an app that used to be my favorite.

Well, it was getting better until the UI was touched. Now, everything seems oriented around PC comfort. Because it is just a mess. Especially when trying to send pictures/videos. With the change, I can no longer go into my gallery and select stuff. It forces me to either doom scroll or use Onedrive, which is something I don't have. Some of my files just flat out refuse to show as well. Clyde is back even though everyone has the content filter off. FIX HIM!

Discord is great for me to keep in touch with friends for things like online gaming, DnD, or just general idle chatter. Screen sharing movies or emulated games also frequently freezes, making them hard to watch. I don't use these features enough to be a major issue, but it is frustrating nonetheless.

The app is plagued with bugs I've been dealing with for months on end. And it's been getting progressively worse. Things seem to just pile on, to a point of app being unusable at times. Forums for example, require me to shut the app down, open on of the channels, then shut the app down again if I want to see another channel. It's pretty bad...

It's a fine app but it always opens to the "Live" tab instead of the "Following" tab. I have never in my life used anything except the "Following" tab, and quite frankly it's annoying to have to switch over every time I open the app.

good lord... this update messed the app up in two different phones. sometimes when i tab out and use another app, there would be audio playing (from the last video i played in Discord)!!!! i have to completely stop Discord to stop it from playing since the video itself is not stoppable when I go back to Discord. very annoying. i don't understand WHY you guys choose to give us unwanted changes to the UI when there was nothing wrong and then cause more problems.

Great communication app to stay in touch with people outside of phone numbers or if they don't have a phone in general. amazing app! works very well and has so many servers to choose from, you can meet new friends and even add people you know personally. but one problem I have that I think is quite unfair, I recently found out that mobile cannot get the free avatar decoration with nitro as PC does, it doesn't bother me much but I feel it is a matter that seems troublesome.
