I am a 69 yo overweight woman who has been inactive for a few years, in part due to a couple of years of cancer surgery and treatments. I decided to give this program a try, as it said it's for beginners and the first couple of days were pretty easy. Then it started doing core exercises and it's way beyond hard. I'll keep at it, because it's paid for, but I'm very disappointed that the only way it adjusts to be easier is to slightly reduce the time on each exercise.

The app suggests you can have a 7 day free trial but they took upfront payment and I have no idea where the free trial went. I wouldn't mind if I actually liked the app. It overestimates calories burned, at my weight 6min of pilates should burn about 26 calories not 70. It's essentially a catalogue of pilates videos which you could access freely on youtube. They don't have a good system for visualising your weight loss progress, before/after photos measurements etc. For me it's been a waste of £

Find this very adhd friendly, as all exercises are short & guided with a follow up suggestion based on how you are feeling. Great for people who want to establish a fitness routine. I loaded the app on 2 android devices, but they are not syncing. There does not appear to be a way to get them on the same page (syncing the email does not result in any change.) that is frustrating.

I'm been really impressed with this app. I've been using the free version and the 10 min workouts every day are a perfect length, there's no excuse not to keep this up. The questionnaire you complete at the beginning means the workouts are tailored. I currently have a wrist injury and I can tell the workouts have been adapted for this. You will need to concentrate to ensure you don't inadvertently sign up to a paid version, but besides that, it's a great way to incorporate a mini workout.

I am super amazed with this app. I use the free version and surprised that it has additional phase when you finish the 30 days. It also looked easy since it only takes 10mins but I feel so sweaty but great afterwards (I only started exercising now after 5 years hiatus due to pregnancy).

this is a con ! you have to answer a heap of questions and at the end it says "get your plan" which you have to pay for ! I was under the impression that this was what the app was ! have uninstalled already, it should be made very clear that you have to pay for the plan! I get that if you want anything else then fair enough pay for it but not right at the start !! Will not be installing again, extremely disappointed as the 'enticing video' showed a few exercises goading you to click !

I think this will be perfect for me in time. More detailed questions about existing ailments should be asked before any of these exercises. I have hypermobility. Exercise 3 (squats) for beginners almost dislocated my hip again. I'll stick with with my therapists 1 exercise for now til bit stronger. Glut bridge focusing on core. - Thank you for your response and greatly appreciated. I'll return to and use this app in the near future :)

I'm just previewing this app and so far I like this Pilates Workout at home app. Exercises seem easy for the amount of calories they say is burnt so i do it twice and i feel a little sweat coming on. Exercises are encouraging and quiet pleasant. Hope to be consistent without missing a day which should be easy. At this point i would recommend to a friend. 5/5 for me❤️

The app's interface is quite challenging, making it hard to locate payment options and track orders. Unfortunately, it lacks clear customer support channels like email or a dedicated helpline, making it tough to get help when needed 😕. Given the app's complexity and limited support options, I'd advise caution before making any premium purchases. The risk of encountering issues without adequate support might outweigh the benefits 💸.

so manageable even with a busy working life. I've never kept an exercise routine up for so long. Exercises are helping me feel stronger and fitter, Ive also had less lower back pain since doing this. I highly recommend this app for over 50's who haven't exercised in a while.

A great app with daily exercises which allows even non premium members to do them. There's just a few short ads at the start and after there's the whole set of exercises so it doesn't bother me at all. The excerses are shown very well in repeated videos plus some extra written instructions if needed,you got timers with countdowns, can pause during and also have the ability to prolong the pauses in between each set. I think it's everything I need in an app for pilates.

I have been using the pay version for a year, and gave me more result that years of expensive fancy gyms and personal training. Now I'm about to enter the second year and keep recommending this app to my beloveds. Is convenient, no need for any special equipment, can be done in any place and any time you need it to. has a variety of excercise options, from focus areas to weigh goals or stretching or for relaxation. The developers did a wonderful Job on this app and I am grateful 🙏🏻.

Exceptional app and different exercises to do from weight loss to pilates to yoga having different levels from beginner to advanced.Extraordinary and great app to use! Recommended to download if having any problems with body loss. I would like to thank the people who founded this wonderful app! Congrats to them 🎉

Everything you need, nothing you don't. I had never done Pilates, but just after a week, I can't live without it. I'm on Day 60 and I am so much stronger, with less pains in my arthritic areas. Had to stop any high impact sports and this is PERFECT. * feel great and my core and bum and legs look amazing. 100% worth every penny. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Been using this app for about 3 weeks now and I love it! I love that the workouts (for beginners) are short and not too difficult. I am a person who struggles to follow at home workouts because i find them too long/difficult, and this app has kept me consistent since I've joined. I am using the paid version, which also gives me access to a bunch of other workouts. I would definitely recommend to check out this app of you want to Kickstart your fitness journey.

no options to set up for men, only women's body types available to choose from meaning the BMI and other calculations are nowhere near accurate which makes the app no use for men. the exercises in the app once set up may be of use to everyone, however the app assumes you are a woman when setting up with no option to change that, goals available to choose from are only aimed at women and I have no desire to achieve a "bubble butt" or slim legs

It is a wonderful guided program with the option to do as much or as little as you like. If you are sore from the day before stick to stretching. it has so many options for different experiences as well. Consistency is key when forming a new habit or routine and this lets you go at a pace of your choosing in the comfort of the atmosphere of your choice. For much less than a gym membership!

Great app to begin with!!...just finished my Day One of the workouts, and I must say I do feel very good, and it also boosts your energy to do more of it!. I hope I get the results the time the app predicted it to be. Thank you for the support, and I shall continue with the positive mindset and not give up on it!

I started using this to app about a month ago. I like how the workouts are broken down and you can do anything from a short exercise to something more intense. It's customizable to fitness level. Instructions are clear for how to do the moves and I enjoy the tracking features for my workouts and fitness progress. It's helpful to be able to see graphs to keep you motivated and stay consistent. I'm already a lot stronger just in the time I have been using this program.

This app is phenominal! You can choose so many workouts! For the past couple of weeks and it has really helped. In the past i have used so many pilate apps and i could not find one that would actually works until i found this app! it has made me inprove when i sleep.

I have completed day one and added an extra on top. - The app is easy to navigate and use. - As a beginner I really appreciate the animation that gives visual and verbal instruction when performing the routine. - workouts are shorter and fit into my busy parent lifestyle. - there are many plans and routines to choose from. You can do as little or as much as you'd like. cant wait to see results.

The exercises are smooth and gentle. no heavy weights. no jumping around, as a retired , older , person. I am looking for improved flexibility rather than increased muscle, so going to a gym was not really an option. so far the app has been nice and steady, good range of movements but still challenging.

very good not only at teaching but also in resilience to keep up and continue in your workout. I always said I would work out but give up two days after I started, but this app helped me to continue working out and even see the end of the month that I would reach.

Tried this app because I like others from the company, but as soon as I open it I'm hit with 2 long video ads every time. The rest of the app experience is pretty ad saturated as well. I can't preview the exercises when I click on a routine to see what I would be doing before clicking start. Sometimes it just starts auto-playing and I have to fight to stop it. App gives me anxiety, deleting. Dumbbell, Workout for Women, and Alpha Progression are all way better app options.

I like this very much,this help to good fitness,This app does not require internet, no need to join the gym, no equipment, no fees, it is totally worth it, we can work out in the morning and evening at our preferred time. This is a very good fitness and health class ഐ love this very much.

Decent, but takes little to no consideration about your physique age experience etc at day 3 It was trying to get me to do exercise that would injure me so quick... there's also no option to add a personal injury/handicap to avoid it asking you for exercises you shouldn't/can't do. Even if you dislike one exercise and say it can injure you, the next day it's recommending the same one... The feedback system just redirects you to Gmail 🤦🤦🤦🤦
good app for beginners, you can see how to do excercises in a correct way in a attached video, for consistency this app is good
this the best app I have ever used to do exercises, it gives you choices to choose the best time and what is your goal. 💪💪💪

Despite paying for the premium version, it keeps re-setting the cookie policy, forcing you to toggle off a long list of 'legitimate interest' nonsense. And they have the cheek to say 'no data shared with third parties' on the app download page. No-one has a legitimate interest in how I use the app. Subscription cancelled and app deleted.

It's great; it has demos on how to do each exercise and stretch along with a reminder option to actually exercise. Also, it doesn't require any home equipment so its great for beginners. There are both free plans as well as paid. Being that i have only used the free option I can state that the only adds played are right when you open it and when the workouts are done so you dont get interrupted. It was great planning.

this app is great, been trying to find an app to help me get fit and this one works amazingly, it keeps me active everyday, minimal ads which is what I would always have problems with, regarding to the other workout apps I have tried.
very good trainings for all levels of fitness. I am using multiple workout ideas from different apps, but they have all you need.
I like this app very much. It has hard exercise to make us active and to loose weight you should try this app . There is not so much add than other app I like this app very much 😁😁😊

it's a very good habit suggest you according to you age your height and your weightage how much you can do workout and how much you can't it only gives you the exercise which are prescribed by the coach in the gym you can find it is same according to your experience and I am very very impressed
this app has been of great help ans the fact that is totally free with no adds makes it more amazing

I had a really good experience with this app. The app has 3 levels which if you want to change at any time you can but I prefer to do all three before you start your journey so you can find the best level for yourself. There is multiple really good workouts if you dont have premium so you wont be missing out to much. The app tells you how the workout will benefit you and the app is really easy to use. It tells you how much calories you lose, and how many workout (min) you have. I 100% recommend

The app is great, i highly recommend you download it, but there's just one problem, it doesn't have a coach-like voice that tells you the importance of the exercise, but you can always find the importance of the exercise when you search how to do do the exercise, i had just done a workout and it was okay, it has an exercise for everyone (optional).

Great for beginners and very user-friendly. Few ads here and there but only after you finish a workout. Great selection if you are looking to get fit at home, however if you have equipment, it would be better to use another app. The app is great, and free, with the exception of the pro version. The free content of this app utilizes mostly body weight exercises. Great app 👌

This app provides a great short workout for busy days and variety in exercises in reverse which helps more for my body. Just starting out with it looking forward to sticking to it because it makes more sense to me to do short workouts several times than to burn your body out right away and stop for a longer time and gain the unwanted weight back. Thank you for this app. Great for modifying exercises for all ages as well.

I tried many fitness Apps; but found this App uncomparable. One, who wants to be physically fit; but unable to go fitness centre, must try this app at home and can fill his/her Mental & Physical changes in a week. Learning videos are available - Learn and Do regular. No equipments are needed; but can use Dumbbells. There are variety of packages to choose appropriate one. Everyone can try from teenager to elder. NB-don't try pregnant women and girls during menstruation. Thanks Developer.

Best workout app! So many programs to follow, individual workouts, short workouts long workouts, easy hard... There's no excuse not to exercise,they have a plan for everyone and every mood. With or without weights you can workout anywhere! I absolutely love Leap Fitness, thank you, you truly help keep me fit!

I was always skeptical when it came to fitness apps. I watched some videos and they were more explanations rather than actual workouts, but this app blew me away. I started exercising about a week ago and I quickly learned I was just running myself into the ground and not making any actual progress. Yes I was tired by the end, but that doesn't mean I got the benefits from the workout, just very sore and that was because I didn't know what I was doing. This app changed all that.

As someone who is one of those "new year, new me" people. I vowed to lose weight and reach my body goal by this summer. I have tried all sorts of apps but I always eventually come back to this one. Easy to use, very beginner friendly if needed. I went up on my skill level and let me just say, I am sweaty but feeling pretty great after the workout I just had. The cool down after the workout is just *chefs kiss*

The workouts here are great, my dudes! Long enough to feel like I'm getting somewhere, not enough to feel like giving up even though I've spent my whole, entire life avoiding physical effort. Plus a pretty accurate step counter. Hell, this app got me enthusiastic enough that I bought bathroom scales instead of just guesstimating my weight for it!

It's a really good app. I've been using it since a year and it has improved my health by alot. It's suitable for all ages (except 12 and below). It's a really good app for teens that want to keep themselves fit. I'm 14 and a half and this app hasade me lose some of my belly fat (because I don't have much to start with). If this app can help a 14 year old lose a bit of weight and get a better physique it can definitely help you.

Great so far! Only thing I dont like is that there are ads. The ads dont happen that often, so its not that bad. I gave it a 5 star because its good, COMPLETELY FREE, and the ad amount is not frequent. I am 11 years old, but getting great work outs that are great and helpful. DEFINITELY RECOMMEND!

It's a challenging app, and one of the best I've used so far. The workouts are exciting and makes me want to push through fitness boundaries I didn't even know I had. The only problem is with the water tracker: it never shows me my hourly reminders.

I like it that there is really a voice coaching you on what to do and counting down the time of how much left in your workout plus it also tells you how to breathe in and out correctly during the workout plus the benefits doing the certain workout. I like it so far especially they haven't asked me for a membership or payment yet.

This app is the best ị have seen so far! I can gym with no equipment, gradually improve and scale up my stamina. My wife and I have made this a hobby. Nit a day goes by and we wouldn’t use it. I highly recommend this to everyone wishing to loss weigjt but doesn't know how, there is a listern I this app.

Actually a pretty good app to guide you through a home workout, kind of 'portable' if you wish to be anywhere else, and it uses cardio as well as muscle focus to help with your future workout plans, there aren't too many ads as of yet but that may change.

I think so this is a really good app for fitness😗.. I am 12yr old but there are soo many exercises for teen , adult , middle aged and all. I actually wanted the old version of this app but the new version is also not bad at all😅.. I was using this app since i was in 6th grade and now I am in 8th grade..😳. Overall I think this is a best app to keep you fit and also motivated..😃 thank you..😅

I had not worked out in a year and this app is the best. It helps me go at my own pace, meaning difficult level. It ask if the workout was just right enough so it knows how to plan the next one accordingly. It has a plan for all levels and body parts. So motivating for me and I am 41. Great app that will help track your steps and water intake as well.

It's getting better, and it has a lot of useful features. I like that I can change the units of measurement, however you have to use the backward style dates (MM/DD) which cannot be changed. Frustrating, but you cannot have everything. I wish it used the phone settings for this, rather than forcing US format.

this is definitely the app your looking for ,,made me loose weight in a month but the more you use the app the more fit and beautiful your body looks and gets . If your a woman like me ,GIRL this is for you ,get that perfect shape you always wanted..and for the man its the same ...you won't regret it,just keeping exercising the results will show ... remember it takes time ,JUST KEEP GOING YOU CAN DO IT!!!

Changed my rating from 3 to 5 stars. The app is good but the ads were getting worse and worse. I've been sending the invasive adds in through the feedback button and it's working. you guys have taken action. Great app for daily workouts or warmups

Uninstalled after they decided to place ads before using the app, forcing users to click within the ad to close. It wasn't enough to have ads during use and also at the end of the workout. its super nice! im a 7 year old and i have been exercising lately, its great for kids like me! its actually nice for kids/adults. i recommend to download/install it! Leap fitness is great!

This app is fantastic! Easy to follow instructions and a pretty darn good 10-minute workout daily. I'm sweating and my heart rate fluctuates between fat-burning and cardio ranges throughout. Right where I want to be. This app is giving me the motivation and discipline I don't normally have. So happy I discovered this!

App is good and workouts too but suddenly drink water popup appeared while i was workouting. It was a stretch part and my phone was not near me bcz i was listened to sound ques of timer so i know when to finish the workout but this time i was still in that position more than 30 seconds so i picked up the phone and boom that popup was there and everything was paused bcz of that. Bro fix those annoying things. If you add that drink water feature fix those disturbances too.

I have used Leap fitness apps before. The home workout app is the main one and this contains all of those workouts and then some. I like how its structured and as a beginner in some areas more int/adv in other areas its easy to target my weak areas. Will eventually swap my premium from that to this when its due.

I'm a newbie in a gym, just starting to move again after a while of not doing much. and the Leap Fitness apps are amazing for that. just pop the voice coach into my ear, look at the animation for dummies (cause I've no clue what's a bicep curl lol) and in three months it took me from a couch potato to 4kg dumbbell on each hand, Level 3 legs&bum and 2min planks. Not a PT, but absolutely perfect for total couch potatoes starting again from scratch like I was. LOVE IT!🥰

Best app for doing exercises. I was an athlete from school. I knew many exercises but always think what exercises to do and skips days without doing much many days. But, this app solved that issues. It guides what to do and get you sweat at the end of the session.

I wanted to get back into working out regularly and I didn't know where to start so I gave this app a shot. I'm not exactly in the best shape and the beginner's workouts are a perfect place to start. They target your whole body without overdoing anything. I definitely recommend to anyone who needs a place to start in their fitness journey.

One thing I would appreciate is the ability to blacklist certain excercises. I exercise at night and if I do jumping jacks I will wake everybody else up. Also I don't have access to a door in the space I prefer to excercise. Great app nonetheless

Go at your own pace! It's free with no sign up and minimal ad interruptions! The benefits gained from daily interaction with this app is highly correlative. Fitness Coach can help you feel and look healthier with easy voice and visual guidance to walk you through 30 sec workouts. Kind reminders throughout workout to maintain form. There's a calendar kept inside that tracks your fitness coach journey day by day and month by month. Recommend to beginners and beyond!

This fitness Coach app is great and awesome. I have enjoyed it alot and it's helpful 🏋️🏋️. The only thing I suggest is that it needs to have a good and awesome graffic and to have an image which will be showing the part that are being worked on orwhich are being exercised. That's the only thing I can suggest for the improvement of the fitness Coach app 💪💪. Thanks 👍🙂.

Great app to do simple workouts at home. They have various workouts that range from haven't worked out at all to the extreme working out person. I know I really like the 2nd level so far. I haven't worked out in 3 years, and into week 3 I can tell the difference tone wise.

I am Using this app from one month, I truly appreciated and enjoyed alot. It is Very beneficial app and every time I feel comfortable and fresh by performing workout and that coach notifies on every point. I m glad to share my experience with you guys and if you like to come out just install it and see magic and you will admire hopefully. Sometimes there are ads, not too much so don't bother not big deal. There are also extra functions like water tracker, and steps counting too

Nice app. For workout.Only little thing I don't get in this app that is for beginners, intermediate, and advanced for full body.And there is no option for full body when I started the app it is asking me what you have to build there is lot of options arms, abs , legs but not full body .Please add this one.App. Is totally good I will recommend this to my friends.Thank You.

I haven't been able to update my portfolio in months. Anytime I try I just get "unexpected error. please try again". So at this point I'm just using the app for the widget because none of my stocks are correct.

The workout player feature on this app has been a god send. It's something I have yet to find in ANY OTHER APP. I've been recommending this app to all my friends and family. Makes going to the gym so simple! Only thing I dislike is that the rep counter is very slow and I wish there was an option to speed it up.

Was unable3 to log into home gym app and was told to download this one instead. But my workout routines are not recorded, so I will have to reenter them all from scratch. Otherwise it appears to be the same

It purports to do a lot, but in reality is simply an umbrella to access my TP app (which is longer than using the app alone). The exercises are difficult to follow on the app and I would say borderline dangerous if you don't use your common sense when following them. I don't like the chat forums and it's payment platform simply does not work.

Overall, this app is great! It sometimes crashes if I pause the workout for more than a few seconds, or glitches and repeats sets. BUT, I really like seeing the preview of the next exercise during my rest period, that I have the option to pause if I need a bit longer to rest, and that a lot of the prompts are both visual and auditory. This app really feels like I have my trainer in my ear, but even more convenient because it's on my own time.

This app has increased my physical fitness. There will be times where I'm just on to log something I've done and because of all of the exercises within the app, I always see another exercise I could do in the moment and increase my workout and calorie burned, so im ALL for it!! Nearly every exercise you can think of is in the app which makes it super convenient. Some have different names than what it may be called in a different workout app, but there's usually a workout.

This app sucks. I only use the QR code to get access to the gym now. I saw I could add a custom workout. Spent hours putting together a custom workout that had 17 different exercises to track. Couple of weeks of using the tracker & suddenly all my exercises disappeared except 4 of them, & there were 2 exercises that I didn't even put on it. Tried to add exercises back. Nope. Emailed app people, updated app, reinstalled app, still won't work. I turned off all notifications. Junk app, wasted time.

Your App isn't working anymore. My trainer keeps trying to add workouts for me but it doesn't show up on my calandar. I have uninstalled and reinstalled but it still doesn't work. It is useless now. Also, I don't know who to contact about this issue as you only have FAQ section rather than a reliable contact email or number. It makes things even more frustrating.

Much worse since last update. For some reason planned workouts now show on a separate screen to other activities that I also want to schedule for that day. So now I have to switch screens part way through a workout. Often I just want to add a few extra exercises to a workout but now I can't see those extras. Also I can no longer tap left or right to move between calendar days, for example to see what I have programmed today vs tomorrow. So frustrating to see a good app made less user-friendly.

Love the app very nice indeed. however I only give 3 stars because there are only few devices which can be connected to the app. I use a Xiaomi smart watch and it's not available in the list nor a Fitbit. Please try to expand the amount of devices that can be connected to the app. Also we should be able to add more exercises that don't need equipment also add a routine for breast enhancement with exercises such as the ones in videos like Hanamilly or other youtubers.

Love it!! There is almost every exercise you can do with all the different equipment in the database. Very few things aren't in there when I look them up. Love that you can link it to the calorie app and see how much you burned with how much you ate that day!! A ton of stuff to see and do in the free app.

I had this app several months as it goes along with my gym membership. I use it to log my workouts, so I can track endurance . Connecting to a heart monitor via watch or armband is a plus, that the app only shows NEO type proprietary devices, which left me thinking that I have to move on to a different app to use a device marketed in my geopolitical region. Nevertheless, I went on to buy a Wahoo Heart Rate Armband, then downloaded the wahoo app; however, later I discovered that the Virtuagym app allows the Wahoo armband to sync with it.

I can't login. Tried several times and then my account got blocked. Then I unblocked my account (which made clear that I didn't use a wrong password or email address after all) and then again wasn't able to login. Keep getting the pop-up that I used a wrong email address or password (but I did not!). Very frustrating.

The app is almost perfect, but please give us the option to disable the rep counter. For some exercises it's too fast and others is too slow. Everyone works out at a different pace and this feature is annoying at best and disruptive to workouts at worst. Would happily give 5 stars and buy Pro if this is fixed. UPDATE: 10 months later and still no option to disable the rep counter. Dropping to 2 stars.

well rounded app, got all you need. Can be connected to several other apps to track all the data you need. One suggestion I have and only reason I gave 4 stars is once you plan out activities and start workout you cant manually add reps and weight to exercises, u have to stop training change then continue. It should have options to put in weight and reps after every set and after that start timer for break. Jeefit app made it work perfectly, hope to see something like that here.

My gym has just introduced this app for their users, and it has so much potential. Unfortunately, like so many other alleged fitness apps, it's unhealthily and irresponsibly focused on the weight of the user (to the point you can't even create an account without providing a weight). It would be so easy to make this field optional instead of mandatory... but right now, its reinforcing the message that the only reason to exercise is weight loss. No thanks - uninstalling.

Hard to use interface, not user-friendly. Finding a particular workout and then making it play took a lot of clicking around to figure out that I had to put the workout on a schedule first. I'd suggest conducting usability testing where first-time users are given typical tasks. Then observe what they do. J&J 7 minute workout app has a dead-simple interface. Aspire to that.

I'm enjoying this App and so far so good. I just have some small critique, I noticed that when booking a service, it is not possible to add the client to the booking until after. Adding the client must happen separately, making it a 2 step process. I think it should be one step not two, To save time. Also, when viewing the schedule it only allows you to view per day. this app sucks, dont get it. Nothing in the app works as you would expect it to. If you plan a workout deleting them is a hassle and also has to be done 1 by 1. The app forces you to perform every workout at a specific rithim. It's just not a good app.

I've used this app for years and loved it, but this update made my experience worse. Before, I could enter reps, go back, and they’d save automatically. Now, it asks if I want to stay or discard, forcing me to press "Save" in the top right—This adds unnecessary steps, especially after years of using the previous system. At least add "Save" next to "Discard" and "Stay." Also, why now does it only show "Finish Workout" instead of how many exercises I’ve completed ? This feels like a downgrade.

Super effing awesome, once you get the hang of using it. I'm new and maybe this is something I haven't discovered but if I exit the app, to check a message or see something with my music player, while a set is in play I have to start over when I come back, find that annoying

I have Seen better apps, the trainings ard very old fashion. I took the 2 weeks trial for pro version, before paying the connection with support was great. I like the exercise database but I hate that's the only thing i really like about it but still you mostly have to have the pro which is a neg. Fague description and details about the app and whats included within the account and the worst part of it all, theres no location to cancel the membership, I have written 3 emails already to them within 2 weeks and no response yet, Im contacting my credit card company to fill a dispute...I wish this company or app was structured differently or this review would be on the other side of the spectrum

I am very disappointed with the app and but even more so with the support team! Plenty of errors both on the trainer and client side. If you have the money to pay for a personal trainer I suggest you find an in person trainer. Trying to contact anyone from the app is impossible. I regret giving a single penny to these people. This app really is the best. When I start to do some excersise I didn't have any plane how I should started. App is constantly having issues. Last month I got charged and couldn't use the app, when I got a hold of customer service she was rude and got offended that I was having issues. I loved this app for years, not sure what happened recently, but its expensive and not worth it.

This app gave me oodles of exercises I would have never thought about. Plus it syncs with the food app which is a plus. They both work very well for me. I've had it for at least a year now, but the last update slowed the app down way too much for me to even use. I am looking for a new app now.

Can't even log in, every time I try it says my account is locked. I try unlocking it and it claims it's unlocked, then try log in again and my account has been locked again. I can log into the website without any issues but the app keeps failing.

pro version only works half the time. Every other day it ask for me to enroll again to use their pro version. I pay it it still does not work. The app is great, but has a lot of bugs (it won't update, so the programs set by my coach don't appear on my app unless i uninstall and reinstall it every time. It is to say, once a month).

This used to be a highly customizable app with enough flexibility to meet whatever fitness goals you may have. Even with the free version. With the recent version, that is no longer the case. I'm not even sure I would bother to use it anymore.

Every new version is more bad. After last update I must search my activities every time instead of choosing from the top of the list. Before that they remove all icons except 2.
